user_comment: BUY THE DRESS!!! After purchasing 7 dresses for my son’s wedding I found this gem days before the wedding. It was flattering, cheap and comfortable. Apparently wearing black to a wedding is a “thing” now, who knew?! I got so many compliments on the dress and the ruffle part hid my tiny bit of belly fat for the win. I am 5”10 162 lbs and the large fit me perfect.

Beautiful Elegant Gown! After purchasing and returning several gowns for my Gdaughter's Wedding I finally found the PERFECT ONE!! This Dress is so Beautiful flattering, comfortable and best of all you can wear your own BRA!! It is not clinging or heavy and hangs Beautifully!! My Gdaughter is getting married in May at The Magnolia Plantation in Charleston, so the design on this Gown is Perfect. I purchased it in the Rose color and it is Absolutely Beautiful! It is between a mauve and deep pink 💗 For reference I am 5'4 and weigh 138lbs Bust 39" waist 32" hips 41" and the size 12 fits like a dream. The length is perfect, so no alterations needed! If you are looking for a Beautiful Elegant Gown for any formal occasion, this is it!! Can't wait to wear this Beautiful Gown to my 1st born Gdaughter's Wedding!! Will update with pictures after the Wedding! Update!! The Wedding was Beautiful and I Loved my Dress! I have added screenshots of a few photos taken with cell phone.

After purchasing several gowns, this one was it. I’m 5’3” with a DDD bust, which was the problem in the other gowns. It’s a beautiful gown, shines nice in the light, and look forward to wearing it for an event next month. I do not have heels on in this picture. I’m 198 lbs.

Beautiful!! I love it!! After reading a bunch of reviews on this dress, I was skeptical because on some it looked SUPER short, and of course, I didn’t know what it would really look like on my body type. Not many (if any) people had the chest that I have (38DDD), and I was unsure of how it would pull up there! As you can see, I personally think it looks fabulous! I love that it’s not form-fitting, it flows and hangs just right, and hides my stomach! I love the one-arm thing, but also, because of my larger chest, I can’t NOT wear a bra, so I just took the one strap down and tucked it in. I’m only 5’0-5’1, 170 lbs., and I think that’s the (main) reason it’s longer on me than on taller folks. Have no idea what it would do to taller people! I personally don’t mind the top “neck” area, and I think it hangs right. I don’t notice any of the “pulling” that some people claimed along the neck-line. These photos are of me just trying it on for the first time, and I plan on wearing it later, so I’ll update this if anything goes wrong! I also plan on ironing it, as you can tell it needs it, right out of the package! Fabric is light-weight, and in this 100°+ weather, I’m hoping it’s not too hot! Anyway, so far, so good!!! Will update if anything goes wrong or happens while wearing it! Recommend!

Great purchase! After reading all the reviews I needed a dress for NYE, so I purchased it. The color is beautiful and it fit great. I’m short 5’2 with a larger chest. Plenty of room very comfy didn’t wrinkle all night. Sleeves were a tad long but not bad. If on the fence order it, you’ll love it! I’m getting another color!

3xl equals size 16-18 After reading all the reviews I was confused about what size to buy. I ended up with the 3xl after ordering all sizes for me because I needed it for a funeral. I currently weigh 218 lbs and I normally wear a size 16/18 I am about 5'6" I wish this beautiful dress came in bigger sizes for my fellow plus size sisters. It is very flattering and it shows off the small part of my waist and helps hide my post momma belly. I would suggest a slip and I hope this review helps someone.

So Pretty! After reading every review I could find related to my sizing and debating over buying the Large or XL, I decided to purchase the XL. I am 5'6 190Lbs 36C I usually wear a 12 in dresses. most pants I have are a 10/12/ large most tops I am a Large or XL. That said, This dress fit me Perfectly!! there is a bit of stretch in the top lacey area. but it fell on my waist Perfectly and with the just barely 3" Heels I fond on Amazon the dress was the perfect length with room. I wore this for my Husband's Work Award Gala and I was worried it might be too fancy but it turned out to be exactly perfect for the occasion. I can't wait to find another occasion for this one.

I had a Christmas party to attend on Friday and wore the large, dark green. I love both, so I will be keeping the merlot colored one, for sure. Excellent value for a beautiful dress. I am 5’4” and wear a 10/12, 36DD. I still can’t get over the price. My daughter has bought a similar dress on Amazon and highly recommends not washing and drying because they do shrink. I will be careful.

BUY IT!!!!!! After searching long and hard to find a dress at plus size wedding stores I stumbled upon this gem! Its just as pretty as anything in store and about 20 times less expensive. People were shocked when I mentioned how much I paid for it because its a very good quality dress. The back is a corset back so you can adjust it to your size as needed. I am a size 18 or 20 (depends on brands) and 5'8" I weigh approximately 230 pounds. The dress was slightly long as its meant to be worn with heals and I wore a petticoat to add some extra poofiness, but you probably don't need to do that as it has plenty of poof on its own. If you are unsure if you should buy this dress I would 100% recommend you take the plunge and give it a shot.

After seeing pics and reviews I ordered this dress for new yrs eve 2022. I paid an extra $50 to get it by Dec 18th. I got an order update, due to delays in the origin city my dress was delayed to the 29th, imagine my panic. Lucky for me it showed up the 22nd i believe. Anyways, the dress (size 8 ) was way to small. I have a size 6 waist but I do work out so I think my back was just to big for the zipper. I'm 5'9 and weigh 160lb but again, my waist is a 6. I took it got it altered twice. Thank God there was enough material to do that. Once it was altered it was amazing. I added the diamond belt and it really came together. I love the feel, the length, pockets, slit, everything. Just make sure to size up. I will now order my dresses in size 12 just to be sure. Definitely worth it.

Fit like a glove on my curves.. wedding mom of bride After shopping at designer stores and coming home empty handed. Daughter’s wedding (destination) was a month away. On a whim, I ordered this dress. I’m 5’4 and 165 lbs. Bigger in bust. I ordered a size large. The slits in sides complimented my legs. I also wore heels because without them. The dress would have had to be hemmed. I wore the deep green and I got so many compliments. It was a November wedding in fla. Give it a try. I’m glad I did

Great dress for the price. After trying on a gazillion dresses for a formal wedding (from just about every physical store and Amazon too), I ended up with this very reasonably-priced dress at the last minute. I am 61, 5’1” and weigh 135. I can’t seem to get used to the fact that I’m not 35 and 110lbs anymore, so dress-shopping for a belly that makes me go up in size while all other areas remain the same is a very emotionally draining event for me and makes it super hard to find anything that doesn’t need $200 in alterations. This dress is a medium and fit perfectly everywhere; it was super flattering and slimming. However, because of my height, it was more of a gown than a high-low dress. Which actually worked for the event we were at! At this price, would highly recommend it. Took off a star because the zipper was a little wonky at the waistline and the underarm area was a tiny bit low for my taste, but other than that, you really can’t go wrong.

Great purchase! After two days of shopping in Charlotte for a dress for my sister’s wedding, I was frustrated. I got on Amazon and ordered four dresses. This one fit perfectly! It was exactly what I was looking for. I usually wear a L in dresses, but ordered an XL. Great fit. For reference, I am a 38 D. I generally wear a L top and 12 in pants. This dress zips up the back and has some stretch. It was very comfortable to move and dance in all night.

Good value for sequined, lined, full-length gown Alex Evening's size 16 Petite fits me, but dresses are rarely available in that size. When available, they often cost more than the same style in a regular size. My measurements are 46-40-46, 5'3". I tried this style 16 Petite. I think it needs to be taken in at the shoulders or something. I don't like that you can see my bra in the right armhole, probably because I'm holding my arm out to take the selfies. Fabric is mid- to heavy-weight and comfortable. Dress is fully lined. The sequined, corded, and embroidered pattern seems designed to hide body "imperfections" and to minimize chafing under the arms. I can't write about durability because I just got it, but it seems very well-made. Ice sage color matches picture. The "shawl" is just a big rectangle 18" x 70" of chiffon--no beading, bit nicely finished with a loop for hanging. It also has a large manufacturer's label near one end that would need to be removed with care to avoid damaging the fabric. It is a lovely mother of the bride or groom gown!

So beautiful! All I can say is 10’s across the board! So in love with this dress, I wore it for my baby shower yesterday and it fit me perfectly. 5’8 155lbs

Wowwww All the other reviews had me convinced, seeing ladies of every size and shape looking absolutely amazing in this dress- but putting it on was something else. If you’re looking to feel like some sort of Greek goddess, this is the dress for you! I am 5’10”, 149 pounds and ordered medium.

Must have! All the reviews were right, and this is adorable! The shoulder ties can be adjusted to make the top and sleeves fit better. I'm only 5'4", and the legs fit perfectly, as normally they are always too long in jumpers. I had to pull the elastic waist up a little higher or it would droop in middle. But the elastic is wide and stretchy enough to fold over and adjust the pants as needed. For reference, I'm 155 lbs and 36D.

Ordered and returned $1000s of dresses...this is the one! Almost never review Amazon products, but I really loved this dress. I as a "groomsperson" in my brother's wedding and literally spent months ordering and returning $1000s worth of dresses from brands at all ends of the luxury spectrum. I panic ordered this dress less than a week before the wedding because I didn't really love what I had and couldn't be happier. You can't be at the price for a bridesmaid dress. The dress is super comfy and stretchy (may need to size down), miracle of miracles you can wear a normal bra with it, and at 5'5" I was able to get away without having to hem it even though I wore tiny kitten heels/sneakers. Love, love, love it. May need it in another color, if only it came in patterns!

Does the job, very finicky for the right tie Alright so here it goes… first of all, for a dress I am most likely only ever gonna wear once, it does the job, is cheap, and looks decent in photos. (In the photo, left is a plus size and right is the regular size.) With that being said, if you are purchasing this dress for a bridesmaid dress here are somethings to consider…. Although you can very easily YouTube how to tie the dress and you don’t need someone practiced in tying this dress to help you - depending on the tie, you may be constantly readjusting your dress. The across the shoulder style was rough for both plus and regular size girl, and were both constantly readjusting. Both ended up immediately tying the dress differently for the reception pictured 2nd and 3rd (bonus for offering different looks) At 5’6, the girl who was in the plus size - with heels her dress was just a wee bit short (can’t see super well in the photos) so keep that in mind for our tall queens. All in all, for a one occasion wear, this does the trick with staying under $70. If you want to be super comfy and not worrying about having to pull at your dress all night - this ain’t it… or any infinity dress for that matter. Hope this helps yall!

Get Out in the town in this one! Alright so I love this dress. It’s sparkly, has like a iridescent shine to it from the sequence. I’m about 173lbs I bought extra large and was way to big took back, then got a medium and it was too small, took it back , got the Large and fit perfectly. I tried it with a pedi coat and it was cute but also gave me extra volume that I didn’t want . I bought a navy shrug on Amazon to go with it and a black crystal belt also (you guessed it) Amazon. And the red heels 👠 also . Amazon . I got a ton of complements and for the price you can’t beat it. It was comfortable, higher waist line so I didn’t have to feel like sucking it in all night . You can wear a regular bra which was awesome, the sequins under the arms were a bit scratchy but nothing to terrible. I’d buy this dress again in any color. There is a thin slip under the dress as well so it isn’t see through. I highly recommend.

Terrific, body skimming summer dress. Although you can see light shining through all four layers of the dress when holding it up, this doesn't appear to be an issue once the dress is put on. It fits wonderfully! The second layer gracefully skims over the first, creating a flattering silhouette. It doesn't skim as well where it fits most tightly, so you don't want to get one that's too tight. For reference, the model in the product images is 5'9" and 140 lbs., wearing a medium. The dress could stand to be slightly tighter at the waist for her. She typically wears a size 8. Overall, it's a fantastic summer dress!

Beautiful Dress! Amazon for the win! This is the first year I didn't actually go dress shopping in an actual store for the Firefighter' Ball. Not because of COVID, but because I was lazy and didn't feel like store hopping. This dress was exactly what I wanted. The material is really nice. Not too light, but also not that super heavy material you find with some formal dresses. It's really flattering with the slight bunching on the one side. The slit is VERY high, though. It's extremely annoying when sitting down because it's actually on the front of your thigh and not the side, so I kept finding myself folding the fabric over when I was sitting. The v-neck was also very flattering and not super low cut. I'm 5'8, so you can see in the picture that it's not floor length with heels on. It was just at ankle length without shoes. Don't hesitate to just try it. Returns are so easy with Amazon that there's really no excuse not to at least try it on!

Great fit/color, few loose threads Amazon got me together AGAIN! This dress looked and felt great. I had to basically sit with my legs underneath the table or cameflauge with my dinner napkin. For reference I am 5’11, curvy 221lbs-ordered an XL.

A Picture Says A Thousand Words 5 Amazon Review This dress is a winner. I absolutely love it! I am a confident woman and this dress met my expectations. I am 5' 4.5" and 140 lbs. I wore a medium with a 2.5" heel and it was perfect length. I read the reviews and carefully considered how I would approach it. I purchased with thought because the event I would attend would have over 300 couples for a Valentine's Day Sweetheart Retreat. I knew that someone else may show up in this dress, I didn't mind (especially since I ordered from this source with over 1400 reviews, not counting those who may not do a review) just in case, I wanted to be different. Guess what? You guessed it, two other ladies had on the same dress, in the same color. They were taller and bigger, so it didn't fit them, like mines fit me. I accessorized heavy and they didn't. I added a black mermaid petticoat, a black bridal belt, in which my seamstress cut the ribbon to shorten it and added a clip. Also, she made me a satin wrap (which gave me options). I wore my silver pumps, crystal tear drop necklace with an older pair of earrings. I was called a Princess (maybe because my father is the King🙌🏾 ). I hope this helps you. Blessings.... This is my Amazon shopping list: black mermaid petticoat Bridal belt Silver patent pumps Crystal tear drop set (I wore the necklace only with a different pair of earrings).

Go ahead and buy it. Amazon said I was between an XL and a L. I got the large and had plenty of room. Snug in the bottom and loser on the top as I have a smaller chest. Added some shape wear and the dress nicely accentuated my curves. I also had a medium but I didn’t like how my midsection looked in it so I returned it. The material is not thin but not thick so you could wear it any season in the south. Plenty of room to dance and not feel restricted. I’m 5’2 about 180 lbs in this photo. Great dress for the price and the prime delivery got it to me quickly.

Beautiful, perfect dress! Amazon suggested that I buy a large in this dress. I am 5’4” and 140lbs. I am normally between a small and a medium size in other clothing. After reading the reviews I decided to go with a medium size since I like a form fitting, not loose. The dress arrived quickly and I immediately tried it on. It fit like a glove. It’s beautiful and classic. I absolutely love it. It was exactly what I had been looking for. I immediately ordered another one in burgundy that should be arriving tomorrow. If you do go with Amazon’s suggested size you can’t go wrong. This dress will probably have some room, which most people like. After looking at the sizing chart and comparing my actual bust, waist, and hip size to it that’s when I decided to stick with my normal medium size. I was not disappointed at all.

Pretty & Perfect! Amazons fashion options continues to come through for me!!! I had to order a dress at the last minute for a sorority event I was attending, so I order this ‘emerald green beauty’ - and it was PERFECT! I ordered a medium and a small to be safe, and the small was PERFECT! The medium was a little too loose around the arm and chest area. I’m 5’3 and 165lbs …and all I can say is for this particular dress style/maker, I was able to pull of a small. It definitely had good stretch and forgiving fabric 🥰💚

Beautiful dress An Eastern Star chapter I was visiting requested all the officers wear white gowns so I scrambled around looking for something that didn't look like a wedding dress. This fit the occasion perfectly even though it is actually a lovely creamy white. I matched it with some sparkly silver shoes and it looked great! The dress even looks good without the jacket but it is very sheer so all the beads and sequins show through anyway. I think it looks better with the jacket on than without it.I used a steamer on the skirt and all the shipping wrinkles went away easily and it didn't rewrinkle anywhere from sitting or moving. However, you will need to use lots of anti-static spray on the underskirt or wear a slip because it clings a lot. However, it is not see through in any way, so a slip is not necessary except for the static issue. This dress is also longer than the photo shows - I am 5'9" and it just skimmed my ankles, which was perfect for me.I felt absolutely beautiful and elegant all day when I was wearing this and got lots of nice compliments. It moves beautifully and I would guess it would be lovely for dancing as a dress for mother of a bride or groom. I plan to buy more dresses from this company if all their dresses are as nice as this one turned out to be.

I’m a bit on the bigger side and worried they’d be tight but I think I’ll be comfortable in them all night, no circulation worries whatsoever.

I'm 5'4" and I think this dress is for taller women. On me, the bodice bagged at my sides and the ruffles just felt like too much fabric. I love wrap dresses and usually find them to be flattering on my hourglass shape, but the ruffles added too much volume and made the dress unflattering. It's a well made dress and the fabric feels nice against the skin. Just not right for me. Recommended for taller people whose frames can handle all of the extra fabric.

Felt like an absolute knockout in this dress💃 – highlights curves, sexy ruffle side split … ANRABESS Sleeveless Bodycon Ruffle Side Split Long Dress I felt like an absolute knockout in this dress! This dress features a sleeveless design that accentuates the shoulders and arms, and a bodycon fit that highlights curves. This dress was designed to fit snugly. The ruffle side split adds a touch more of sexy to the dress, while the maxi length gives it a classic and sophisticated look. The dress is made from a high-quality fabric that is comfortable and breathable, ensuring that you can wear it all night without feeling uncomfortable. The material is also stretchy, which makes it easy to move around. This dress was so close to perfection. There were two minor flaws, but they are definitely not dealbreakers. First, I wish the straps were a touch shorter or adjustable. Second, the cut of the top is a little awkward - it’s a little loose around the cleavage. I don’t know if that is on purpose. Also, there is a gap of the material on the right side of the chest (where you can clearly see my bra), but since it’s also black it blends. I absolutely love the design of this dress. Although the top may not fit perfectly for everyone, the dress is a great addition to any wardrobe for formal occasions. (For reference, I am 5'8" and 125 lbs, with an athletic build, and my current measurements are bust 35.5, underbust 29 inches, 28.5 inches for my waist, and 37.5 inches for my hips. I went with a size small and I think that was the best size choice for me.) 4.8 stars

Appealing and curve hugging, this dress won’t disappoint if you’re looking for that wow factor. The neckline is a nice asymmetrical design that adds interest and flare to this piece. The ruching is a nice touch and forgiving of the midsection. This is a form fitted dress, it does tend to rise up. It does have a slit in the back making walking easy. The back zipper can be difficult to close on your own and keep in mind your complexion should you choose this color camel like I did. As you can see, it is close to my own skin tone and can give the illusion that you’re not wearing anything at all! Very SATC Carrie Bradshaw and The Naked Dress!! A (black) blazer is suggested should you choose to wear this (color) dress to the workplace. Age 46. Weight 135lbs. Height 5’5”. Size Small. Color Camel.

Are these pants giving welcome to Jurassic Park? Yes, but am I also falling in love with the vibe also yes. I am in between sizes so I when with the XXL short because I’m 5’5 and hate my pants to drag on the ground. I wish they were just 1/2 bigger and highwaisted. Apart from that I’m loving them.

The dress was perfect! Arrived quickly, true to size, felt well made for the price, and was perfect to celebrate my 50th birthday and NYE! I’ve never been so happy with an online dress order! Thank you! (5’ 8” ish 264lbs 3X)

Solid Buy Arrived surprisingly quickly. I had gone through the reviews and found someone who was a similar size/shape to myself, and went with the size that worked for them. I’m glad I did! I’m 160lbs, 5’3”, 34DD, 31” waist, 40” hips. Women’s clothing is so hard to gauge for sizing. Depending on the department, I’m anywhere from a S to an XL, the average being a M/L. The customer’s review that I went off of, had purchased a M. The fabric is a flowy, breathable velvet. I actually really like this dress for my body type. A lot of clothing clings in the wrong areas, but this dress is rather flattering. This dress is not a faux rap - it is a true wrap. As you can see, there's not a huge difference in the bust snap being open or closed. I will be painting it black just for subtleties, that way I can wear it to be more open or closed and it be less noticeable.

The “long” is truly long! As a tall girl ™️, I saw the “long” option and had to give these a try & back. I’m 6ft, with a 37” inseam. “Long” is so often a joke. But the large/long are 45” waist to floor, with a 30” inseam plus 13” rise… (obviously with this style the crotch is dropped). I like the weight of the material and they felt comfortable but these wide leg pants are actually so wide, that with me having very wide shoulders & no curves on bottom (I have no waist or hips & a tiny butt lol), they kind of drown me. If you have a different body type I think they’d look really cool. I am going to recommend them to my also-tall but different-shaped sister. And I know I appreciate when other long-legged tall girls speak up about pants, so I wanted to let you know my findings!

OK for petite As an elder millennial my go to pant style has been slim or skinny, so I decided to try the current looser trouser pant trend and bought these in xs short in mocha. I'm glad I did! The quality is pretty good for price (got it on prime day) and the style is nice. My only concern, which is very specific to me - it's VERY hard to shop my size as I'm 4'9" and about 95 lbs. I'm extra petite. Rarely anything fits me perfect. The wide leg and pleats do kind of overwhelm me. But... I also feel I can pull it off as long as the rest of my outfit/top is fitted to counterbalance. Just take a look at the pics and you'll see yourself. I got the short length and while it should hit my ankle its full length on me and even when I'm wearing 2.5 inch heels (again, see pic). So, while my purchase isn't a miss, it's not perfect hit either but that's cause of my size. I'm still going to qear the pants tho! :)

Comfortable and well made As it came out of the box this dress was a little wrinkled, which is to be expected. I could have steamed the wrinkles out for the picture that accompanies this review, but didn't so you can see what to expect. I asked my model to try it on and tell me what she thought. "I like it," she told me. It's comfortable and it fits well. Do you mind if I put your picture in the review? "That would be fine." For reference, I ordered a size Small. She is 5'4" tall and 100 pounds. It was a perfect fit for her.

Great dress As most people are, I'm always nervous about buying clothes on line, and I was really nervous about this dress because I NEEDED it to be perfect, and it was!!! I'm 5'7" and approx 230lbs, and normally wear an XL, but I r3ad the reviews about sizing up, so I got the 2xl and it fit like a glove. The material is comfortable, and feels like it's great quality. So happy with my purchase!

As short/petite at 5' and 150lbs, I bought the size 12 for my hips so it was a little big in the shoulders so appears to be true size 12. I cut off 7" from the bottom carefully cutting around the beading/sequins and tacking them up on the inside. It was a very pretty dress for a dim evening event.

As short/petite at 5' and 150lbs, I bought the size 12 for my hips so it was a little big in the shoulders so appears to be true size 12. I cut off 7" from the bottom carefully cutting around the beading/sequins and tacking them up on the inside. It was a very pretty dress for a dim evening event.
Great fit! As someone that is tall (also 5’10”) length is always a concern for me. This dress fit great, super light and so comfortable. Unfortunately not as dressy as I needed for the event.

Checked all my boxes As someone who has a really hard time finding and spending money on clothes, I felt cute and beautiful in this dress. The neckline was flattering, the sleeves are able to cover the biggest parts of my arms, and the dress didn’t show off my stomach. Note: the sleeves are held in place by elastic and did tend to move around a bit. I am 5’11”, 196 pounds, with a 43 chest and 36 waist. I went with the XL, but I probably could have gotten a large. The fabric is quite thick and had a lot of stretch (almost like a scuba suit?) The dress had some, but not a crazy amount, of wrinkles out of the box. I paired it with a petticoat and a black cinch belt. When my sister saw me in the dress, (she is a similar build to me) she said she wanted one too. Bonus: if you want to Disney-bound Ursula, the purple version of this dress would be great for it.

Nice Dress As soon as I put the dress on, i see it had two small holes. I couldn’t return it because my event was that night. I sewed it up and wore it. Other than that, it fit great. The material is soft. I ordered a large and I am 5’6, 218lbs.
Perfect Dress As soon as my dress arrived. I took it out and tried it on. I weigh 173, I'm 5 feet even and I purchased a LARGE and the dress fits perfect! Glad I made this purchase.

Gorgeous, Well Fitting Dress As the title says, this is a gorgeous and well fitting dress. The green color is spot on and beautiful. I love the softness and stretchy of the fabric. It accommodates and hugs the curves. It is also lightweight yet drapes well. The gold buckle in the middle is a nice touch. The back of this dress is unnecessarily complicated I will admit and the reason for 4 stars. The fit all around is great on the other hand. I was surprised that it was long enough for my legs. Most dresses like this are not. I ordered the Small and I am 5'10, 118 lbs, 31-25-34 for reference.

High quality, great stretch, comfortable As you can see I’m pregnant, I was looking for a dress I could buy and possibly use again after I give birth & this was perfect. I was a size small before pregnancy & purchased a small & medium to try both & went with the medium. The small would have worked but was a bit tight around my hips/ butt due to my stomach. Also medium provides a better length. It’s got great stretch & isn’t sheer at all. It is supportive but not restrictive (may be able to skip a bra & wear pasties like I was able to) so I was comfortable all night at a wedding, sitting & standing. I’m 149 now but was 134 before pregnancy & mostly have gained in my tummy. I’m 36 C/D bra, 5’6.5” & hips are 38” or so. Hope that helps. :) Im picky with material & quality, this could have easily been purchased at Bloomingdales or Nordstrom & I think you’ll love it & it’ll become a great closet staple.

NOT THE DRESS THAT IS ADVERTISED As you can see, the dress is quite different from the product image. In the product image, the bra area is much straighter and looks sturdy but the actual dress has a deep cut and the straps do not adjust AT ALL. Secondly, I was hoping for a minimal floral pattern like in the image but instead this dress had flowers all the way down. Lastly, the material turned slightly white in the areas where it was stretched. Amazon sent me a new dress when I advised them of the inconsistencies but the second dress they sent wasn’t any different from the first. Overall, it’s not a terrible dress but it’s just not the dress from the product image and I just can’t get past that. For reference, I’m 5’1, 130lbs, 32DD and ordered a small.

GORGEOUS, I FEEL LIKE A GODDESS! & i found a 2nd way to wear it? As you may have guessed it is very long. I am 5'2 & wear an xs if it's available, otherwise a small. That's in everything. So I went with it for this dress. My feet are drowning in the extra fabric but then I put big heels on & there is still drag on the ground. That's OK tho I'll figure it out for the sake of this diamond of a dress! The part that hangs in the front on the chest over the floral, it is detached/movable. So I saw that under it is a pretty floral bra basically that you'd find on other dressed. I decided to try flipping the detached piece to the back and sure enough it worked as you can see in pictures 4 & 6. Now it's like a different dress because of the breast part! I hope you followed that, keep in mind. I don't think it's meant to change like that so I had to be SUPER CAREFUL when stepping into the dress & pulling it over my hips with that piece being in the back. I am very slim and not working with much in the back so it may not work for everyone like specifically the blessed girls with a big bty in the back. Again it's gorgeous. I see one in pink that I'm reallllly tempted to get but it is in a small instead of an xs. I don't think it'd be bad, im not sure if the length would be diff but most importantly I don't go anywhere special! It'll be a long time before I can wear this dress surely. But the pink one if it is still on vine after a while I'll prob give in because it looks so pretty in pink which wasn't available when I ordered this color. I have no regrets though. Yes pls get this dress if you like it & can afford it and with a special occasion I promise you will light up the room! Very unique from what I see usually.

As advertised At 220lbs, 44-37-46 and 5'6" the dress is a good fit with great stretch(put.on without using zipper). To be honest could probably have gotten away with a size down. Definitely an outfit for a night out with the amount of sparkle- will need to and wash. Fabric soft, not itchy and certainly not see through.Only thing I would change is the straps...the adjustable bra-like presentation does cheapen it a bit in my opinion.

Tall people like a nice set of trousers too- thank you!! At 5'10" my whole life has been a struggle to find long enough pants. Over the years it became easier to find jeans & yoga pants but any kind of dressy, business, or WIDE LEG pants? Nope- like searching for the holy grail. I took a chance on these & I am so happy I did! The length is very doable, perfect? Not exactly, but still very much a win. Wide leg pants really need to be long enough or they look ridiculous & these only come an inch or 2 off the floor & they don't look absurd when I sit down. The material is nice, it's lightweight but not so much so that it rests too much on my skin showing every imperfection. These maintain their shape well for a flattering look & don't wrinkle a crazy amount. I do think they run a little on the smaller side though. I thought the button was tighter than expected based on the size chart. According to the chart I should've been able to size down but I ordered large hoping I'd get a tiny bit more length & I could belt them if needed. The elastic at the back kind of helps with that though so they don't dig into you. I machine wash these & hang them to dry, I'm obviously not willing to risk any length by drying them lol.

Beautiful color! Beautiful color and good quality. XL got great. I am 5’7” and length hit just below the knees. Only draw back is the straps give zero support. They are more like just pieces of elastic. With a good strapless bra it was fine.

Perfect fit, cute dress! Has pockets! Beautiful color, stylish dress. Conservative but not frumpy at all. Shows off the positive qualities of my figure and minimizes the flaws. I have a very long torso and this dress actually shows off my waist, which is a nearly impossible feat on my physique with mass produced dresses. I think it would fit women with regular length and even short torsos too. I wore a wide belt, which further accentuated my waist. Fabric is thick enough not to show every bump but not heavy or hot. It has a great amount of stretch which makes it comfortable and allows me to move my arms freely without ripping the dress up the back like The Hulk. I have muscular arms and often find even short sleeves on garments far too tight and constricting. The sleeves on this dress were perfectly comfortable. Dress has pockets so I could keep my cell phone on me. The pocket size and placement somewhat concealed the bulk of the phone, maintaining a more streamlined look than some other pockets do. The back zipper is okay quality. I've seen better zippers, but I've seen many worse zippers, and even returned dresses for bad zippers. This dress would be appropriate for weddings, funerals, parties, church, office work, job interviews, and many other occasions. Different accessories would easily change the look. I plan to buy at least 1 more of these dresses because I like it so much. I'm very happy with my purchase. In case it helps, I'm currently about 173 pounds at just under 5'4." I always weigh more than I look like I do because of how my particular body is. I suspect that some other people my size might weigh about 165 pounds. Size Large fit me perfectly.

It does show your curves, thus ANY & ALL flaws LOL so I think I'll be adding some shapewear when I wear it out! But, it's a lovely dress overall! It does have a nice zipper, but it's stretchy enough I didn't even need to use it & just pulled it over my head to put it on! I wanted to mention that I haven't seen ANY sequins coming off either which is GREAT! I saw another review mention something about that, so I wanted let you know my experience with them. I love the nice smaller size of them too! Gives a WAY more expensive vibe which is great as this was listed for $55.99 when I got it which is reasonable I think. I also LOVE the purple color! It's just GORGEOUS!!! Love that the straps are adjustable as well! The lining is simply attached at the hem at one point so it can move about, which is a nice addition I think! Just a great dress!! A+ for me! If you want a little glamor in your life this is a MUST have! Hope this helps you decide!! I love it! Thanks much!

Colors darker than online picture, lots of sparkle but maybe too much for MOB or MOG Beautiful dresses, depends on what you need it for. I needed it for mother of groom, a little too flashy for that as I didn’t want to take attention away from the bride, and I don’t think the dress would have photographed well in wedding photos with all the sparkle. You can’t see that in online pictures but actual dress is very sparkly. Also a lot of loose sequins, not sure if that’s typical of a dress with a large volume of sequins.

ATTENTION short ladies!!! Before buying this dress I was unable to find a single review regarding the length of the dress and how it fit without alterations/hemming, just a lot of people who had alterations done. So I am here to leave my vertically-challenged review if you are anything like me and sometimes do things at the last minute. This dress came in 3 days before a friend's wedding and thankfully, I was able to manage wear without needing it hemmed. I did not wear any heels as you can see and the dress was just fine, although I did have to pick it up a little when walking upstairs (I almost tripped over it when I didn't). I stand at the measley height of 5'3". If I'd had it hemmed then I would've maybe only had an inch to 1.5 inches hemmed, so if you're worried it'll be too long, try not to stress about it, unless you're even shorter than me. Then, it might be worth having it hemmed. All in all, it was a lovely dress with good quality material. I loved the versatility of making the neck line any style you want to wear. I went with tying it in a halter style because it compliments my shoulders.

Before I ordered the dress I had read through a lot of reviews to see how the dress fits in order to determine what size I should order. I read a ton of mixed responses, quite a bit saying the dress fit bigger than how the sizes normally fit; however, I did not experience this at all. The dress fit PERFECT and very true to size! I was actually shocked at how well the dress fit. I wear a size 6 dress normally, but my measurements (based on their size guide) were all over the place. It said I was a size 4 in upper measurements and like a 10 in lower measurements such as my hips. Since I was having such a hard time with the sizing, I decided to just order my normal size (which is a 6) and I would just get alterations if needed. So from my experience, order your normal dress size and hopefully you will be just as pleased as I am! Just in case someone needs a general idea of how the size 6 fits, my height is 5'4 and my weight is 122 lbs. My bra size is a 32B and my hips are definitely "child bearing" hips! LOL

Poorly made. Both stars belong to the sequin top fabric. It is very pretty, soft, stretchy, does not scratch or shed, the green color is awesome. Everything else gets 0 stars. The lining is made from cheap overstretched material, which is not even fitted, you can see in the picture how the black lining is hanging about 2 inches below the top edge. It does not feel nice on the skin either. The skirt has a nice shape, I should have ordered S, but I was concerned about the top not fitting (I am 6-8, 34DD, 5’9”, short torso, 27-28” waist). I normally order M unless it is a bodycon stretchy item. The top sort of fits, but I will not trust it to stay in place if I move. Any activities like dancing, walking around etc. are out of question. The top is supported by really overstretched cheap string, which is not going to stay put. I will try to separate the bottom, take out the lining and substitute it with a better fitting slip, it will take a while, but I really wanted green sequin maxi. As a dress it is 2 inches too short for me. I cannot recommend this dress, especially if you are buying it for an upcoming occasion and have no time for adjustments.

Petticoat almost required Bought size large based on the size chart. I am 5 foot 6 inches and 162 lbs. I love the look of this dress. The pattern is as depicted and the length is just right. The one thing you need to remember is that as stated, this dress is polyester. So it's light, but does not breathe well. I am a curvy girl. I do not have a boxy figure, but because of the cut of this dress and the way the waistband hits on me, I feel that without a petticoat (which my mom happened to have and let me keep) this dress falls a little flat. In the pictures I have given, the first one with the green headband around my wrist is without a petticoat, and the second one is with a petticoat. My only other possible complaints are that I wish the sleeves were a bit more fitted at the bottom and I wish that the neckline was a little more open.

Simple, Beautiful, Elegant Bought this as a bride to be; we’re planning a casual sundress type celebration as opposed to anything overly fancy, but I have had this dress in my list for years and it didn’t disappoint. First, this is actually true to size. I am 5’0”, 145lbs on a good day, and I’m always afraid to buy a medium because some brands too small, but then a large will run way too big. I got the medium, and I feel like I have room to move around without compromising the shape of the dress, which hugs the right places but isn’t tight on any curves. The zipper and all the materials definitely seem quality on this dress. Highly recommend.

Fantastic formal dress Bought this dress for a formal "Sneaker Ball" event because I thought it looked both elegant and comfy. Well, IT IS! I have an hourglass figure (wide hips and shoulders with a narrower waist). Most pants don't fit my thighs if they fit my hips well but these hugged everything in a flattering and comfortable way. (For this pair of pants I'm referring to the majestic style pants here). I need a pair of work pants so I decided I would order the exact same pair in black because I loved them so much. I got the majestic in the long length (which were too long but I didn't mind) and the black pants in the normal length, but the black pants were nearly the same length! Super disappointed and returning. I would buy the majestic pair again though.

Versatile Dress! Great gift and good service Customer service: I picked this dress as a gift for my sister since she's going to a ball. And it has been the most satisfactory shopping experience on Amazon. The seller answered my question in a short time, which helped me a lot. And the packaging was neat when I received it. Product quality: The infinity dress caught my attention by surprise. The design is amazing because you can wear it in different styles. I decided to order this one after comparing it with a few other sellers (I can return it if I don't it...nothing to lose). The dress is surprisingly well-made. The tailoring is one of its kind, unlike an ordinary dress, as if it was made with a single piece of fabric, not patchwork. It has smooth texture. My sister is 5'7" wearing 2" high heels. The length is perfect since the skirt is just about to reach the floor. The dress looks elegant on her. She tried out different styles and thought she would wear it in various events. The fabric is smooth and looks vibrant under lights. It has good stretch but cannot see through. The dress is raw edge without any threading. But the fabric won't become fuzzy or twisted. So you can trim it if you like a split dress. I want to add that the package included a bandeau, for girls who don't want to reveal their back, the tube top is such a big help!! My sister bookmarked the product page because she wants to order some other colors. Recommended 100%!!!

Conservative but still sexy Cute two piece set. It is a thicker silky material and very comfortable. I think it would be a little warm to wear when super hot out, but would be a great fall option. The pants were my favorite part. They are high waisted and hit right at the floor for length. They also have pockets which is always a plus in my book. Being 5’7 they would be too short to wear with heels, but they looked super cute with sandals on. For shorter girlies, heels would definitely work. The neckline on the top is higher, so definitely modest. The front was shorter than the back making it slightly cropped. But between the neckline and the way the sleeves are cut I felt like it made me look broad and top heavy. I ultimately ended up returning it because I didn’t like how the top fit so I deducted one star. For reference I wear a Victoria secret 34DD and a size 27 or size 3 pant. I think if you are looking for something on the conservative side with a sexy pop (the slightly cropped top) this would be absolutely perfect!

Cute dress with medium shaping Dress just arrived and I tried it on so note that this review won’t mention anything about wear over time, etc. Overall, the dress is really flattering and comfy. It does what I wanted and is true to size. I’m 5’10” and it reaches my ankle bone when standing which is nice. I think the biggest thing to keep in mind is that it’s medium control shapewear not super firm control. So you’re still going to be your shape, just held in a little. I still definitely have a mom pooch in this dress but it’s more smoothed out than if there was no shapewear. I also think it’s probably best to wear this with underwear that doesn’t give you any lines or cut into your sides at all so you don’t get a weird ripple shape because it’s so form fitting. I think this dress would be best for going out to dinner, family photos, and maybe even an evening wedding if you dress it up with heels and jewelry.

True to size and flattering Dress runs true to size, the first one I got was in a large bag but was a medium so I tried it on- didn’t fit, the large I ordered fit perfectly. I have broad shoulders from lifting am 5’8”, 34ddd, 42” hip, and 33” waist- dress has some stretch but not a ton and the zipper in the back ensures it can be a more snug fit than just pulling over. The only part that was a bit awkward was the front panel is just that- there are two slits not just one so when you sit you end up with a back skirt falling back and away with the front panel there. It’s ok but made it a bit awkward to sit as the slits go all the way up to seam connected to the bodice portion of the dress. It’s comfortable, the color was a blue toned green, great quality, flowed well and wasn’t stiff, and I’m very happy I didn’t go buy a $200 dress when I could get this one for considerably less for the same function. I glammed it up with accessories and an updo for a gala and wore it to family pictures - super versatile. Sorry ladies, no pockets.

Dress was sheer. You can see the white corset I’m wearing under the dress. It has a thin liner, then a single layer of chiffon. I’m returning and ordering a smaller size (my fault, not the sizing charts) and will be ordering a slip to go under it. Granted, I’m 5’4”, but from hollow to hem the dress is at least 60” when the sizing chart said 58”. Even with 4” heels the hem dragged. Ordered mint and the color is great. Good last minute wedding gown EDIT: this dress was BEAUTIFUL for my small outdoor wedding. I got so many (online) comments asking where I got it and saying it was beautiful. I felt comfortable and confident all day. I did have to hem it as I’m 5’ 3”. I did a super sloppy job, tucking fabric up under the belt, and the sewing on this gorgeous Etsy belt. It created a small train but was still easy to walk in. I just wish I would have remembered to steam the sleeves as they were a little wrinkly. Also wish it wasn’t 100 degrees that day. The lining did ride up a lot when I was trying on but had no issues day off. I did have to buy a slip though as it was a little see through. All photos look great though!! Bought this for a small wedding. Pros: flattering in the chest arms region, super easy to hem (tucked fabric under the ribbon belt and stitched), light and breathable, flowy, good stretch. Cons: wrinkles easy (nothing a steamer can’t fix though) and while it fits well in most places, it’s not the most flattering to my lower tummy... but that’s a my body thing.

I was able to style it to look very nice on me with the right accessories (wide cinch belt, shapewear & jewelry). The fabric feels heavy when you pick the outfit up, but it is actually quite light and breathable when you put it on, suitable to warm weather temps. I love the open back, and that it has pockets. This would look great with a variety of belt widths, heels or flats; it has a lot of styling options whether you dress it up or go casual. This is a great multipurpose outfit.

Beautiful style dress, fits like a glove on hour glass figures First let me say I am obsessed with dresses from this company, VFSHOW. I needed a dress for a party and this was the perfect color and style. I own a bunch of dresses from this company because the fit is just perfect on me. For reference I am 5’5” 116lbs measurements 32-26-38. I got the X-small and it fits me like a glove in the hips with a very tiny bit of room in the bust and waist. What I love is the style of this dress. It’s fitted but has a flouncing hem at the knee. The overall style gives such a great hour glass shape. The length is also perfect hitting me right at the knee. The fitted style is sexy yet the length and higher neckline keep the dress modest. The color is a slightly off white, not pure white. I wore nude color underwear and you couldn’t see a thing. The fabric is a decent thickness so you really can’t see through it unless you have bright pink or a vibrant color underneath. This dress would serve great for wedding event, bridal shower, baby shower or party. It got it for a Christmas party to dress up with black jewelry and heels. All in all I’m really happy with this dress, it looks great.

JUST BUY IT! You won’t be sorry! First let me say that I am always very nervous about ordering any clothing online. I have bigger upper arms and a bigger butt! I have an hourglass shape and sometimes getting a good fit can be hard! I have the kind of shape that makes jeans “gap” in the waist when they fit everywhere else! So I was worried about this lace and my arms. I needed a cute, classy dress for a wedding we are attending in two weeks & I fell in love with this style immediately! After over an hour of reading reviews and trying to compare the height, weight & size bought by others who had purchased this dress, I was back & forth trying to decide between a medium and a large. I finally decided to go with a size large! (I am 37 years old, 5’6” and 170lbs. I normally wear a medium or larger or a size 8/10 (rarely a 12 if it runs small), like I said I have big upper arms, and a big butt). I got the dress 2 days after ordering it (Thank you Amazon Prime) and was first impressed by the quality of the dress! It is made of a thick material and doesn’t feel scratchy or cheap at all! I was so surprised by this given the price point! As others have said, it has a “rubber” line along the inside of the shoulders and the chest area to keep the dress from sliding down. It is a beautiful navy blue! The material is so soft, it almost feels like cotton, which makes it incredibly comfortable! The dress hits just below my knees (again... I’m 5’6” tall with average length legs). The large fits GREAT! I *probably* could have gotten away with the medium but the large doesn’t look baggy or frumpy at all. My husband said, “Wow Babe! That fits like a glove and you look sexy and classy!” So YES! I am very satisfied with my purchase. I will absolutely be ordering from this buyer again and I’m excited to try other dresses now! I know you’ve been reading tons of reviews at this point and are probably on the fence, so let me reassure you... JUST BUY IT! Amazing dress for the price First of all this dress is well made and a great silhouette for my shape. I bought this dress in both a medium and a large. I am 5'4" , 135 pounds and generally wear an 8. Both fit, but I would have only been able to sip water during dinner in the medium. It was snug, but the length was perfect. The large gave me more wiggle room and ease and I was confident I could enjoy my company Christmas party/dinner without feeling uncomfortable. Going with the large meant the length needed to be shortened. I had to take it to a seamstress to remove about 4 inches off the bottom. With 3 inch heels it did not drag on the floor. Sizing up was the key to comfort for me. I was also able to wear this dress two additional times during the holidays which meant I definitely got my money's worth.

Flattering dress, well made, received lots of compliments! First of all, I am 57 and worried this might be "too youthful" for me - but no! This dress is absolutely stunning! I am hourglass shaped, 5'7 155 and wear a size 10 or 12 in a skirt or pants. I thought about getting a large - but at the last moment selected a medium. It fit perfectly! Very forgiving in all the right places - flutter sleeves, tie at the waist for definition (and the waist isn't too high like other dresses on here!), layered ruffles, but not frumpy - the slit makes it feel updated and modern. Some info - yes, it wrinkles, but is very easy to iron using steam setting. I ironed it on the bed at the hotel in 10 mins, no problem. The waist is a little fitted, so you're likely putting this on over your head (just for gals who like to step into a dress). I had no problem with the snap coming open. It is slightly low cut, but you could always layer something underneath to fill in the "v." There is a liner, so if the dress blows open a little, no worries at all, you're covered to just above the knee. I was walking down a boardwalk to the wedding ceremony and had many compliments - I think this dress is really flattering and flows nicely as your walking! The dress is flowy, like the store photos show, BUT not light chiffon, as it may appear - it has some substance to it. I was at an outdoor wedding in a forest where it started at 75 degrees and cooled off in the evening - it was perfect for this event, I threw on a wrap. If it was 90 outside, this dress would be heavy and hot. As for the color - this is the gray blue. Sometimes it looks darker or lighter, depending on the light. I'm getting a few more in different colors! Hope this helps with your decision.

Great Quality First of all, i Loved this dress. It looked exactly as shown, the colour was a deep vibrant purple. The quality of the fabric is great, thick and sturdy with a lot of stretch. I am 5'3, 180 lbs, and i got a large. I could have gotten away with a medium for a more snug fit. The length was great for me just like i wanted it. I did wear a body shaper for a smooth finish. I was mortified when i got to the church and there was a circle of sweat on my lower back area. I may try to get it lined for the next time i wear it. I do love this dress!

Color and fit made me smile! I love this dress!! First of all, I’d like to thank all of you for posting your pics of your dress for review!! It was so and because of that I was inspired to buy it. I will try to do the same more often. Ok, about the dress!! I actually love it! The 95% Poly 5% Spandex mix gives it a smooth draping over your body and would require easy care when traveling. So at 5’2” size 14/16, my frame is short. The plunging V line was a bit much for me so I put a tankini underneath and pinned the opening slightly together. With a 2 1/2 inch heel it needs no hemming. Lovely Color & Design First of all, the color is FABULOUS! The fit was perfect. I am 5'6" and was very happy with the length of the dress. It was comfortable to wear and made me feel pretty! Feminine fit, and flowy! First of all, the fabric of this beautiful dress is light, yet the bodice has a lining. The navy blue is such a nice, rich color, the A-line falls so sweetly to mid calf, and I love the sweetheart neckline and the cape sleeves. I wasn’t positive what size to order, because I usually order a size small (I am 5’6” and weigh 115 lbs.)—but with a dress that follows my shape, I didn’t want to be too perfect. I ordered a medium, and the fit gives me a tad more room, which is nice, actually, because I can always take it in a little. But I think I might have fit into a small, because my shoulders are narrow/medium. I didn’t want to take a chance, though. I recommend this dress; I think you’ll like it. 😊

First off - it's a very pretty dress. I wore it to a friend's medieval-themed wedding and got lots of compliments on it. It fit rather loose on me. I'm 5'3" and the dress didn't reach the ground, but definitely came close. It's also a fun dress to dance in, the bottom part is very swooshy. The bottom has a lot of fabric so I had to arrange all of it whenever sitting down or getting up from a chair. A few things that you should know, that were the case with my dress, at least. 1. The smell. This is mentioned by the seller (smells like a thrift store). I washed the dress 4 times and it still has the smell somewhat. I ended up wearing a lot of perfume to mask it (which did work, but shouldn't be necessary). 2. There were lots of loose threads on the dress (see the photos). Given the cost of the dress, I wasn't expecting the most high level quality, but it's worth noting. 3. Bunched seams rip easily. Every time I got in and out of a taxi or sat down on a chair, some of the bunched seams in the lower skirt of the dress would rip. This was not any tight area of the dress, but the flowy bottom part. Didn't ever rip open the dress completely or affect the integrity of the dress, but it was an audible ripping sound and feeling each time it happened (5 or 6 times in one evening). 4. The bust was not sewn shut. See the photos with my review, but there was a small area of stitching holding the dress shut, but otherwise it's fully open. I wore a black undershirt to prevent any exposure, but just be prepared for this. Also the stitching closing the bust area was also coming slightly undone with loose threads. As I said, it's a gorgeous velvety dress for a good price, but it does have some flaws. It served me well for my purpose, just posting my honest comments about it so you can make your own choice whether or not to buy it. Also I loved the burgundy colour!

Looks really great actually, but the material is a little stiff and it rides up A LOT when walking. It’s already above the knee and I have long legs, so it gets really short when I’m moving about, which becomes really annoying having to keep pulling it down. It’ll probably be best during the cooler months with tights. Other than that, it’s really pretty.

Almost a full 5 stars First out, the dress comes in a zippered bag, and I immediately noticed the quality of the material. I was thinking this was going to be thin satin, however it is more of a flannel backed satin - fine flannel but this makes this less showing of every pucker. The material made me say 'wow'. It is heavy and hangs beautifully like a very expensive dress, and the cut is also a classic but a saucy type of a classic so it gives the look of a designer dress. The length is above ankle on my 5'6'' body, perfect to flash a stylish shoe. My size is about a 14. I ordered XL. I am on the taller side, and pear shaped with a very straight figure. I hoped the dress might work and it did. The cloth hangs without showing dimples and such, but you do need some type of mild shaper under garment if you are middle aged like me :) to smooth out the bigger bumps. Given my slightly plump physique, it looks surprisingly good. Fits to size, but I will likely drop a little weight by the time the wedding comes around and this should look even better. There is only one drawback to the dress. The side zipper puffs out on the side while on the opposing side it does a little too but not quite as much. I believe if you are very busty this would fill in the gap, but I am average sized there so it looks off. I will likely fix this myself with a stitch or two but may hit the seamstress. Also I should say that the bust area does show a good peek but this is easily modified with an undergarment, or a pretty pin. I may do this, rather than flash too much. I really love this dress and I would say if you are taller with a straight figure it works even with a few extra pounds or a not so perfect figure.

I can see your decked halls First the bad: These pants are very poor quality. I bought the navy and they are so thin they’re almost transparent. I would expect that of a white pant but NAVY?! I pulled them out of the package and immediately saw my Christmas tree gleaming through the cheap fabric. Obviously anytime there’s light behind fabric it’s going to look a little crazy but this was bad without the Christmas tree exaggeration. The positives: short length is perfect for 5’3 in flats, which is a rare find. Apple shapes may want to size up based on the waist but generally this is probably true to size. The wide leg is very wide to me but again I’m a shorter person so this fit can be overwhelming regardless of quality.

Pretty, Not Flashy, Old Fashioned, Stately First, for reference, I'm 5'4 and 165 lbs. I normally wear a 12/14, Large or L/XL. Based on the size chart, I ordered the 14 and it fits great. Could actually slide the dress over my head without unzipping the side zipper. At 5'4 the hem almost brushes the floor without heels. I would have preferred a more midi length like the description photo but I'm sure the model is much taller than me. The material is nice and I'm sure will look 100% better once this garment is steamed. It's definitely giving me a matronly vibe. The sequins at least are somewhat muted and not ostentatiously cheap looking. I do think the price is a bit much for the overall look and quality.

Perfect wedding dress—just check it carefully upon receipt! First, I LOVE this dress—it was perfect for my cliff top/ beach elopement! Just be sure to inspect the dress thoroughly (top to bottom and inside), because I didn’t realize until months later…two days before our wedding…in a foreign country, that my dress had water stains at the bottom —all the way around the dress and dirt on the hem line. MY dress had been worn previously and repackaged as a new dress without being laundered first! Fortunately I’d already contacted a local laundry service to iron our outfits and they were able to fit me in—the day I arrived after 26 hours of travel. They washed and pressed my dress and it was so beautiful, so I feel lucky. BUT, the cost to urgently lean and press the dress plus a few Uber rides to drop off and retrieve my dress cost as much as the dress itself. Everything worked out and I focused on the solution, our special day, and the universe rather than this F up with Amazon’s repackaging team…or whoever was responsible for that. It’s not worth my energy to chase down any kind of reimbursement IMO, but I wanted to alert others to inspect carefully before hanging your (hopefully NEW dress) in your closet for your upcoming nuptials. The fit: I’m 5’ 4 1/2” and 127 pounds. I ordered a 4 and it fit like a glove. Snug across the back rib cage, so I went braless to keep my back smooth. With the breast padding, I didn’t need a bra anyway. Enjoy!!

Beautiful dress but came ripped First, I loved the dress. The fit was great. I used it for a wedding I was attending. Loved the wrap skirt top part because it let me cover up my little nelly pouch. I got a XL and I’m 5’3” 180lbs for reference. I like that I can tie the little skirt to make the dress seem shorter but still loosen it up if I needed to ever use it for a work event. Now….. it came with a rip on the side :( the seam came undone before I even put it on the first time. I got it the DAY OF the wedding so I had to do a quick sewing/fabric glue job on the spot but in hoping I can exchange the dress.

Get the dress!! First, I will say I spent hours searching for a dress for a wedding. I wanted something that was dressy, cute, and made me feel comfortable and confident. I almost didn’t order this one because it’s tighter and I like on my stomach but I tried it. Get the dress. I am 5’2 and 160 lbs with a mom of 4 kids belly. It’s something I hate and always want covered. This dress was amazing. It’s tight in the right places for me (top and legs/butt) but was looser around the midsection. But the best part was was fabric over the dress that made it unique and also covered the part I didn’t want tight. It’s the perfect dress. I felt so confident and I also got so many compliments. I did wear some shapewear shorts underneath because I wanted a bit more smoothness but honestly I didn’t need it. And when I got hot later on, I took them off and it was just as perfect. If you’re in the fence, just get it.

Very nice - love the plum color First, the description says “buckle closure” but this blouse is strictly a pullover, the bottom of the V neckline and sleeves have gold decorative pieces. I don’t really like the way the piece below the neckline looks, plus it’s too heavy for the fabric, so I probably will take it off. The ones on the sleeves are tiny and look nice. This blouse is semi-opaque so not too sheer. It is very ‘flowy’ and falls nicely, perfect for leggings when you want to cover your butt. Blouse is pretty generously sized, you could probably size down depending upon how you want it to fit. Note that the color in my picture is a little light, the blouse is a darker plum. Here are the measurements of the size medium. Across shoulders, seam to seam 18” Chest 40” Hip 45” Sleeve length from top of shoulder 17” Length from top of shoulder 27” (front) - 32” (back)

Beautiful dress, perfect for my bachelorette party First, the dress is way more pink in person than in my photo, the product photo is much more accurate. I’m 5’8” and 155 lbs, a 32 DDD, 29 inch waist, 41 inch hips, and the small fits me perfectly, the size chart said to get a medium but based on reviews I sized down, and that was definitely the right choice. You also don’t need a bra for this dress if your boobs can hold themselves up if you catch my drift, the fabric plus the sequins is enough to provide coverage (and I always wear a bra).

VERY BRIGHT GOLD First, the good things about the dress. The quality was good. The fit was good. I normally wear a large, extra large, so I ordered a double X to make sure it would fit right and it did. It was very elegant. Now, for the not so good things. The material was a bit scratchy on my arms, chest and back area. It also made me look fat, but that could be my opinion or the mirror or the way I took the photo. Who knows! Maybe I am fat. Lol. The dress is very long I am 5’ 10 and it went to the ground on me. I think if you are not weird about how things feel on your skin like I am, or if you like very bright design, it is a perfect dress up gown. This is not a paid review

If you have large bust - Beware. First, this dress is STUNNING. Out of the package, every particle in my body was hoping this dress would be “the one.” My best friend is getting married in October and having a celestial theme but it’s been so difficult to find a purple MOH dress in the shades she loves. This dress could be perfect. From the flowy sleeve, the overall fit was perfect, it’s soft, comfortable, beautiful. BUT - it is BEYOND ME, why any vendor would cut a dress that would be used for more formal events this low and not have some kind of latch/hook situation as as option. In many reviewers pictures, it didn’t appear to be so low cut. I’m a 42G for reference, while I was hoping to have a reduction before the wedding (insurance sucks) I really thought this dress was going to make me feel beautiful but instead made me hyper aware of my body dysmorphia and there is no way I’d ever wear this standing next to my best friend at the altar.

Comfy and stylish for the right body type! First, this dress is very comfortable. I am between a size 6 and 8, but wear S tops, so I ordered the small and it fit like a glove; slightly snug but would have worked for me because I am still on my weight loss journey. Pros: Very comfortable, lightweight fabric. Pretty true to color (slightly slightly redder in person). Cons: Will likely snag and rip easy. Length is also too long for petite ladies. I am 5’1” but this would still be long on someone 5’6”. Fabric would be a little too fragile to hem in my opinion. The ribbon belt makes it less flattering surprisingly!

Pretty, Sexy, but not really well made Firstly, I am 5'5" tall/122/35-29-37. I normally wear a size 4. I bought the S and it fits perfectly. It hugs in all of the right places. The red color is gorgeous. The design is elegant and fashion forward. However, the dress had several snags in the material. I was able to pull them through and they do not show, but I can tell that the material will be snag prone. It will be an on-going problem, and there comes a time with this kind of fabric that it does show and cannot be effectively fixed.. The dress was way too long for me. I would have to shorten it by at least 4". The top fits nicely but you have to "play" with it to get it to sit right. The strapped side actually sits slightly off shoulder. You have to pull the waist down to sit a bit low on the waist. It does not feel as though it would ride up once adjusted to the right spot. Once you get the hang of it, it should not be a problem. Overall, a nice dress that will suit formal occasions and be very comfortable to wear.

PERFECT DRESS Firstly, this dress is absolutely gorgeous. I have never been complimented on a dress so much. I’m 5ft3 and 180lbs. I ordered a large (in the dusty rose, not all white) and wore it without shoes. It’s very long, but if you have heels you may only have to tailor it a little bit. The lace work and details are amazing. The fit was a little lose when I first tried it on, but with a strapless bra and the back laced up it was a perfect fit. Absolutely GORGEOUS on!!!! Firstly: I NEVER write reviews. I bought this dress in the white and the black intending to keep one, but both of these beauties have a home in my closet from this day on! The fit is accurate to the chart, so follow it. Fabric is light, but not transparent or cheap-textured. Cotton/spandex with some stretch..enough that I could have ordered the L instead of the XL, but I like my clothes a little on the loose side. Stats: 64 years old, 5'51/2", 150-155lbs, depending; Bust: 38C bra (wearing a Carnival long line 36d in the pics as well as Cupid shapewear bottom...but I could have done without them.) Waist: 33", Hips: 42". I follow the charts for 40-33-42. I wear a size 12 dress and 10-12 pants (age-related butt atrophy, lol!!!) Bodice of this dress is LINED with a poly knit, so the pleats stay flat across the bosom, which is tacked with a stitch. Pic included. The waist actually measures in at a 35, plus there's some stretch, so it is generously cut. The skirt is not a full circle skirt (as in my Grace Karin dress,) but it's more of a 2/3 circle skirt, as pictured...that's the only point I may have changed. But that said, you can see that it accommodates a crinoline very prettily. I tend to be long-waisted, but this dress actually fell to my waist, unlike the Karin dresses which fall somewhere between my bust and waist. I'm not short - 5'51/2, and even with the crinoline the dress fell to just below the knees. All said: Great dress, great fit, quality manufacture, great price and a great value. Buy it, ladies, and you'll feel like a 1950's beauty!

Absolutely GORGEOUS on!!!! Firstly: I NEVER write reviews. I bought this dress in the white and the black intending to keep one, but both of these beauties have a home in my closet from this day on! The fit is accurate to the chart, so follow it. Fabric is light, but not transparent or cheap-textured. Cotton/spandex with some stretch..enough that I could have ordered the L instead of the XL, but I like my clothes a little on the loose side. Stats: 64 years old, 5'51/2", 150-155lbs, depending; Bust: 38C bra (wearing a Carnival long line 36d in the pics as well as Cupid shapewear bottom...but I could have done without them.) Waist: 33", Hips: 42". I follow the charts for 40-33-42. I wear a size 12 dress and 10-12 pants (age-related butt atrophy, lol!!!) Bodice of this dress is LINED with a poly knit, so the pleats stay flat across the bosom, which is tacked with a stitch. Pic included. The waist actually measures in at a 35, plus there's some stretch, so it is generously cut. The skirt is not a full circle skirt (as in my Grace Karin dress,) but it's more of a 2/3 circle skirt, as pictured...that's the only point I may have changed. But that said, you can see that it accommodates a crinoline very prettily. I tend to be long-waisted, but this dress actually fell to my waist, unlike the Karin dresses which fall somewhere between my bust and waist. I'm not short - 5'51/2, and even with the crinoline the dress fell to just below the knees. All said: Great dress, great fit, quality manufacture, great price and a great value. Buy it, ladies, and you'll feel like a 1950's beauty!

Beautiful, comfortable dress with awful zipper For photo reference: I'm 5'4", 163 lbs., 40D bust, and in the photo I'm wearing 3" heels. The dress is size 14. After these photos were taken, I hemmed about 3 inches for it to be just at floor length without tripping me. (You can hem this dress up to about 4" without needing to sew anything; the overlay fabric doesn't fray, so it can just be trimmed evenly all the way around.) I'm mid-body change at the moment due to a medical condition, so none of my evening gowns currently fit, and I didn't want to buy a structured formal that won't fit me in two months. This dress is *perfect* for those in weight loss/gain transition, as it's well-designed to be flattering on a variety of body shapes and has enough stretch to handle weight changes. The empire waist helps conceal my slightly pudgy stomach, while the ruffled sleeves hide my squishy upper arms. Because of the stretch and drape, I think it will continue to conform nicely to my body even as I lose the medical weight I'm currently carrying. (Note that if you're a little on the busty side, as I am, it will give you a bit of a top-heavy silhouette.) Though there's nothing high-end about this dress (the fabric is not expensive, just basic sparkle stretch over a matte Spandex blend), it's great in other ways: It packs without wrinkling too badly, and it's incredibly comfortable to wear! It also falls just at the right point of the body that I can wear my normal bra with it and don't need special foundation garments. The only drawback is the zipper, which feels too delicate to handle the amount of fabric crammed into the seams on either side. It sticks frequently, and at one point actually stuck me in the dress because it had jammed closed; it took several minutes of careful manipulation to get it unstuck. I've had similar zippers break on me, and I'm dreading having to replace this one when it inevitably gives out (really not a fan of sewing zippers on stretch fabric, though I've done it a number of times). Great dress otherwise, but I docked a star for the zipper. Make sure you trim away any loose threads and keep the zipper lubricated with graphite or other fabric-safe lubricant so you don't put any undue stress on it.

I'm mid-body change at the moment due to a medical condition, so none of my evening gowns currently fit, and I didn't want to buy a structured formal that won't fit me in two months. This dress is *perfect* for those in weight loss/gain transition, as it's well-designed to be flattering on a variety of body shapes and has enough stretch to handle weight changes. The empire waist helps conceal my slightly pudgy stomach, while the ruffled sleeves hide my squishy upper arms. Because of the stretch and drape, I think it will continue to conform nicely to my body even as I lose the medical weight I'm currently carrying. (Note that if you're a little on the busty side, as I am, it will give you a bit of a top-heavy silhouette.) Though there's nothing high-end about this dress (the fabric is not expensive, just basic sparkle stretch over a matte Spandex blend), it's great in other ways: It packs without wrinkling too badly, and it's incredibly comfortable to wear! It also falls just at the right point of the body that I can wear my normal bra with it and don't need special foundation garments. The only drawback is the zipper, which feels too delicate to handle the amount of fabric crammed into the seams on either side. It sticks frequently, and at one point actually stuck me in the dress because it had jammed closed; it took several minutes of careful manipulation to get it unstuck. I've had similar zippers break on me, and I'm dreading having to replace this one when it inevitably gives out (really not a fan of sewing zippers on stretch fabric, though I've done it a number of times). Great dress otherwise, but I docked a star for the zipper. Make sure you trim away any loose threads and keep the zipper lubricated with graphite or other fabric-safe lubricant so you don't put any undue stress on it.

Inconsistent but pretty For reference im a size 6 pant, sm/med top and roughly 5’5. Ordered a medium in 2021 for a wedding & it was skin tight, stretch cotton fabric feel, not satin but had a shine to the fabric, and the fabric had some kind of white backing that made the dress look a bit cheap to me. Now Oct 2022 I ordered a large for another wedding now that there’s more/better reviews and I didn’t see the white backing & ordered a size up since my previous medium was so skin tight. This time the dress is truly a satin fabric, no white lining on the fabric, and large is a bit too big in this fabric so I probably should’ve ordered a medium if I knew the material improved. Im not sure if they’ve improved the fabric since 2021 or if certain sized/colors just come in a different fabric. I originally ordered this dress because I owned and loved a similar dress from a popular fast fashion website and wanted a similar dress is another color. This new 2022 large dress is much more similar to that dress than the 2021 with white lining. I’d consider returning and sizing down but I’m not sure if the smaller size would come in the different fabric.
