Love the color! A little too thin for me For reference, I am 5’9”, about 170 pounds, and I ordered a Medium. This dress is a great option for a wedding or cocktail hour! The lilac color (“Light Purple”) I ordered is absolutely gorgeous and the gauzy sort of material gives an ethereal look to the dress. I deducted a star for the thinness of the dress as a whole. While the rouching can be forgiving, it was still not enough to smooth any lumps and bumps underneath at all, making me feel like shape wear is a must-have for me to wear this dress. Of course this may not be true for everyone.

Amazing! For reference, I'm 5'0", ~180lbs, measurements are bust 44", waist 37" hips 46". I ordered a size 20. It was a tad loose (didn't hug anything tight whatsoever) and I noticed it was ever so slightly stretchy and soooooft. If you aren't planning on wearing a bra and your ladies don't defy the laws of gravity, you'll have some chest room (it'll be looser). I really enjoyed how it fit me, however! Nice Quality Teal Dress For reference, I’m 5’1 and 88 pounds. This dress was a little loose on me, but it fits me well enough for me to continue to wear it. I wrapped the tie around the waist twice to make it feel less loose and more secure. However, if you are larger than me, you may not feel the need to wrap it twice around your waist. I like this dress. The color is perfect for the Fall and Winter seasons. I was surprised by the thickness of the fabric. It is not extremely thick, but it has a good amount of thickness which it makes it feel like nice quality to me. The fabric does have some stretch to it. It’s a professional dress that you can wear to the office, to a somewhat fancy event (like a play downtown or the symphony) or to any place where modesty is of importance.

Perfect for weddings! For reference, I’m 5’2, 130lbs, 36B. Ordered a small. I bought this dress for a summer wedding and couldn’t have been more pleased! The dress itself is lightweight so you won’t have a problem with feeling too hot, but it’s thick enough to hide the lines of any shapewear. I also didn’t need to get it tailored, whether I wore heels or flats. I received so many compliments about how flattering and classy it looked! 100% recommend for summer/spring weddings! Only advice I’d share is to find a good set of pasties since you can’t wear a bra with it; the ones I wore were okay, but I still had to adjust during the night (top wasn’t loose though).

Fits great! For reference, I’m 5’4, 120 lbs. I ordered a size S. I thought it fit nicely and very flattering. Maybe could go to an XS if you want an even more form-fitting look. I did have to steam mine it came very wrinkly, but they came right out!

Decent, but overpriced For reference, I’m 5’9 and 162 pounds. The dress matches the picture for the most part, except the strap which is positioned further from the shoulders than I expected. The color is nice and really pops. The material feels a bit cheap and the stitching is meh. However the slit’s length and placement was excellent. It’s an overall good dress, however, the price is high for what you get. It should really be between $15-$20.

I’d Have Liked An XS Better. Royal Purple. Nice Details, Materials, & Construction. For reference, I’m an eccentric Goth that typically wears a teen size S or XS and a 32B bra, I’m 5’4, 115 pounds, and I have the Theatrical Romantic Kibbe body type. I ordered this dress in a size S in the color “Purple.” While this dress fits me flatteringly for the most part, it’s loose enough at the waist and in the bust that it would likely look even better on me if a size XS were offered. It fits very nicely when curving around my hips and butt for a sexy silhouette. Without shoes, this dress drags the ground on my shorter frame, so at least a medium heel is necessary for me. The top of the slit hits right at my knee, and this dress exposes minimal cleavage if I wear an ultra push-up bra. All of the details, from the peplum and ruffles, to the pretty lace, to the sturdy ribbon at the waistline, look gorgeous. The color looks a little different than what my screen shows. My screen shows an almost blue violet while the dress I received is more of a royal purple (see my photo). The blue violet would have worked better for styling this with my goth accessories for a mysterious, elegant look, but I can still work with the royal purple. This dress utilizes a hidden-type zipper in the back, and it has typical hang-ups every time the fabric changes as you’re zipping it, which is twice. The materials feel like what you would expect from a quality bridesmaid dress, and they all have a tad bit of stretch to them . Everything is appropriately thick, so nothing is see-thru that’s not supposed to be. To my novice eyes, the stitching looks pretty good, but there are still several, short, loose threads that could have been cleaned up. Overall, this is a pretty dress of nice quality. Even though I would have preferred a tighter fit for my petite frame, this is still plenty flattering on me.

Versatile and comfortable For reference, these are a small. I’m 5’5”, wear 27” (size 4) pants, 32DDD bust. These were very high waisted on me (I am a bit short waisted) and were pretty snug on waist but fit my hips. I thought about going up a size but think they’d be too big in waist. Palazzo style fit, and can be dressed up or down. I liked that the waist had a hook closure in front but was elasticized in back. Looked more professional that way, especially with a crop top. Fabric was as expected - not sheer but not heavy, the drape was flattering.

Ugh. Wanted to Love This… For Reference: I’m 4’11”, 120 pounds, with 34d bust. I wanted to love this soooo much, I couldn’t wait for it to get here and honestly this is one of the most disappointing amazon purchases in a long time. First - the material is SO a cheap feeling, I hated the way it felt against the skin. Second - the stitching created weird lumps and for the lining to show (see pic of lining showing at the chest, and a lump under the armpit. Third - the quality just is not there at all. You can see so many loose threads I’d be scared to put this through the wash. Ultimately I’m sending this back asap - I wish this would have met my expectations. I can’t believe what I got for the price…. Yuck.

So. Many. Compliments. For reference: 5’2”, around 150lbs This fit me perfectly. I am so comfortable in this dress, it’s amazing. I get so many compliments, both on the fit and the color. Easy wash and dry is bonus points! I kind of want to get another one!

For reference: I am 5'8, 155 lbs, 38C bra and purchased this in size 12. I am wearing 2" shoes with the dress, and you can see how long it is. It is pretty long, so take that into consideration when purchasing that it might need to be hemmed. The inserts in the chest area were uncomfortable and just wonky, so the first thing I did was make a small hole to pull the inserts out and hand sewn it closed. Definitely not a big deal to spend 10 minutes doing that for such a cheap alternative to a more expensive wedding dress! I am also wearing a full length nude slip underneath because unfortunately, it is thin material and slightly see through from the waist down. The good news is minus everything above, it fit perfectly! It was so soft and comfortable. I live in Florida and was married in the summer, and it gets so hot and humid here. The dress was cool and flowy and exactly what I was looking for. I would definitely buy it again.

Pretty and comfortable. For reference: I am 5'8", 190ish lbs, 36DD, pear shape, 37" waist, 45" hips. I ordered the Black Grace Karin Sequin Dress in an XL and it is a comfortable fit. It is neither too loose nor too tight. There's some stretch to the waistline for plenty of breathing room. The dress is lined and not scratchy at all. The top of the dress sits well and is not restrictive. The zipper works great and I have had no issues with it sticking. The main thing to note is the length, it is a longer dress and may not work as hoped for shorter ladies. Overall, I am very pleased with this dress. I find it both flattering and comfortable. A win win, especially when you are on the larger side of the scale. Looking forward to wearing this at an upcoming event.

If you have a stomach… not for you. For reference: ordered a medium, I am 5’2”, 150lbs, and a 36D. The length is great, the material is to be expected. I am returning because the fabric clings in all the wrong areas and the top detail folds over in an odd way.

Cute dress! For reference… I’m 5’3, 145 and 34DDD and I ordered a medium. Definitely needs to be steamed as others have stated. My only issue was too much cleavage. I don’t like any showing at all.. I simply put a tank with some lace at the top under and it worked well. It also was a tad shorter than I liked but not too short by any means.. depends on how modest you are! But the dress looked nice and I was happy with it!

Super Stretchy For size reference I am 5’7”, 40 DDD and normally a x-large on top and large on bottom. Usually a size 12 in pants. If you want to show boobs, size x-large. If you want it more conservative then xx-large. Super comfortable, stretchy. I still wore spanx and cakes. The color is more fire engine red. I stepped into the dress so I have no preference on the zipper. Can’t beat it for the price. I received so many compliments.

Sexy & Fitted For sizing reference, I'm 5'7" 130lbs and 34D. I chose this in white and size small. This is a very fitted dress, and to be honest I probably could have easily gone up to a medium and the fit would be a lot more comfortable. But the small isn't bad, it's just a little tight for my personal preference. I do love that this dress has a full zipper down the back which makes getting in & out of this fitted dress super easy (I've had other dresses that are a nightmare to squeeze into but not this one lol). I also love that it's not a see-thru fabric so if you wear nude colored bra & panties you won't see a thing. Overall, this is a sexy dress and is perfect for a night out!

Not the picture at all For starters, I know that you take a chance when online shopping. However, for 50$, this dress is not it. I normally wear a small, but I decided to order an XS so if anything I’d size up. However, this dress was entirely WAY too long (I’m 5’7 with long legs, so usually dresses look too short on me), and it was at my knees. The arms aren’t anything like the picture, and the chest size was HUGE. I don’t have a big bust, but some dresses that are XS I’m practically falling out of. I definitely recommend sizing down if you have a smaller chest, or sizing down in general. It was also see through on the back, and honestly kinda heavy around the bottom. The ribbons are nice if you want to flatter your waist, but again I would not reccomend buying it if you’re around my size. I’m 5’7 and 125lbs for reference!

Runs small For starters, I’m 5’2 and a half, around 135 lbs, and I have a 34 D chest. I typically wear small/medium or 4/6 but after reading reviews I went with a large in this dress and boy am I glad I did. It fit perfectly. I did wear a little spanx type thing underneath to slim out my waist but other than that- the dress was beautiful and I got compliments on it! Perfect going out dress.

Thinner than expected For starts, my measurements are 31-23-35 103lbs 5'3. I got the xs. It fits snug enough. Kind of sits funny on my waist, might be because I have a short torso. It's much lighter and thinner than I was expecting. If wearing this for fall you will need layers. The fabric is crepe-y feeling. I think other colors would be more versatile, but I got this specifically for fall. It is surprisingly shorter on me than I expected considering I'm on the short side. I was hoping to wear this to church, but not sure how I feel about it lol. I really don't like that the shoulders have that weird pop up at the top. I like smooth shoulder tops and the sleeves on this dress pop up at the top. Otherwise its cute. Hoping a wash will calm those shoulder pops down.

Definitely needs a petticoat! For the price it’s a nice dress. I was looking for a party dress and really loved the photo used to model the dress. For the price I knew I wasn’t going to get the puffiness in the skirt so I took a chance purchased the dress and purchased a petticoat. It gave the dress a little more structure. I think in total I spent around $55 which is still pretty good for a party dress. I took a photo with and without the petticoat on, and you can totally tell the difference. Mind you in the photo I don’t have the appropriate undergarments on but once I do, the dress will look even better. The material does have some stretch to it so be mindful of sizing I’m 5’2” and weight 160 pounds. I normally wear a size 12 or 14 depending on the cut. I chose an XL for this dress and it was a little big not much to require alterations but enough to doubt my size choice. I’m happy with my purchase and I’m ready to party! PS Please excuse my hair and my face I’m not mad dogging you I have Bell’s palsy.

4’11” 128lbs, size small For the price its a good dress. I have a large chest 37inc and hips are 37inc. This dress is pretty roomy around my hips. Im planning to keep it since i think the xs would be too snug and i dnt need to look like a sausage. This material is satin like, so if its too tight its going to give you that sausage effect. The draping helps though! There are threads sticking out around the seams and buttons which i expected, just going to trim those off before i wear it. It came super wrinkled so after steaming it the length was past my feet a couple inches (which is normal for me). ive got to wear it with heels and it should be great. There is some stretch so id say it fits true to size and you can size down if you arent afraid of the satin material hugging u

BUY THIS DRESS!! For the price of the dress I was skeptical on how it would fit and how the quality would be. When I received it I was impressed, it looks more expensive than an 38 dollar dress!! It fit like a glove on me and it was very comfortable to wear (not too tight or too loose). I got lots of compliments on the dress! It's a perfect dress for a wedding or party. You can wear this in summer or winter so I like that it can be versatile. For reference I am 5'3" and 147 lbs and I ordered a Medium. I have a bit of a mom bod and I felt that it hid any bulges and made me feel confident. I will be buying this in other colors! There was another girl at the party I went to in the same dress and she also looked amazing!

Perfect for large chests! For those like me who love a size reference...I am 5'3", 150 lbs, bust 32GG, typically size 6-8. I ordered a size 10 and it fit perfectly, no alterations. Ladies with a large bust...this dress did NOT disappoint! Believe it or not, I did not need to wear a bra with this dress. Never, and I mean NEVER have I been able to wear anything without a bra. The structure of this dress actually held me up and was supportive. Not once did I have to adjust. I was amazed! I also loved that there was a netting that backed the lace so it was never itchy. So many options, comfortable Funnily enough its simply a tube of slinky material with two long bands that is endlessly customizable, esp with the included bandeau top. So comfortable though! Luckily for me being 5'2" this was absolutely the perfect length and I did not have to hem it- so if you are taller you might need another brand. Another one I had ordered i would have had to hem like a foot off of it. You can see in the last pictures the length with no shoes on but with a few inches it was exactly perfect for wearing. I had it snug up to bra line and tight straps to support the girls and chicken cutlet type. Bra tape showed thru this soft material but the sticky cutlets type blended fine. I used the included bandeau outside over my abdomen to add more rusching and length to the super long wrap strands. I recommend if you are not going to wear some spanx-ish (,i ended up with klyvee i purchased and reviewed separately) and will be wearing a thong/g-string that you tie the bow in the back so that you don't have the material fall between your crack, lol... as I found as I was trying different options before.

Get them!!! Get them. I wear these all the time with everything! From the office to off duty. They give you an instant fashion boost when you put them on. I also love that they are super comfy and they don’t wrinkle easily. Pockets are always a plus. As far as I know, they are not see-through. I usually check every time I wear something dark underneath. They are a lightweight fabric. There are some defects in the sewing, but they aren’t super noticeable. I had some overlapping stitching at the bottom of the pants near the seams but you wouldn’t notice normally. I do wish the pants fastener had a button in addition to the metal slider one. I’m 5’4” and I usually prefer to wear something with a slight heel with these or they may drag on the floor.

This dress can make it through all seasons of wear if you pair it with suitable accessories and undergarments. It is the perfect dress.

Covers all manner of sins Got this for my friend’s formal wedding. I am currently 5’3, 180 lbs, DD and the XL fit very well. The length was perfect which was nice, because I didn’t have time to get it hemmed! I ordered over 20 dresses and this was the only one I could tolerate myself in. The lace covers the arms…the black is slimming…the silhouette is flattering. The slit breaks up the black a little and shows some skin. My only gripe is that there are only spaghetti straps underneath the lace. So technically, your bra shows unlike what people said in reviews. I wore a black bra and black Spanx and luckily the lace makes it difficult to see unless you’re really looking. But ideally, the straps on the built in slip would be more tank top style. Anyway, overall this was perfect for the event and I got many compliments. I’m really not thrilled with my post-kids shape right now and this dress made me feel at least somewhat comfortable. One last thing, it does show w decent amount of cleavage so if that bothers you, might want to wear a slip or have fabric sewn into the neckline.
Beautiful dress Got this for my mom. She loves it. Great material. Great quality. She's 5ft 124lbs. Got a size small

Comfy and Flattering Got this for Taylor Swifts, The Era's Tour, IT WAS PERFECT! I got lots of complements, it was so comfortable and very flattering! I was between a L and XL but went with the Large. If you have a larger chest, you might want to size up but it wasn't a problem for me. I was worried about it being short but at 5'2" it was a great length for me. It was also very good quality and the sequins didn't bother me.

Elegant-- may need minor adjustments Got this in black as an orchestra dress for a teen, and she loves it. Really has a beautiful shape, simple & classy, and it avoids both the "prom look" and the severe or frumpy look. It's also light and comfortable. Sizing was a little tricky. Normally would get a 6/8 but the 10 fit better around the waist and ribs, however now there is a little too much room in shoulder. You also may need to hem it shorter, depending on your preferences, because it touches the floor and has a train on a 5'7 person. (Photo shows dress with its original fit.) Still, it's really lovely and has a timeless look, so we think these minor tweaks are worth it.

BETTER THAN OTHERS!! Guy’s I have shopped around on quality and fit. For this price, you’re definitely getting your bang for your buck. It’s extremely comfy, stretches, and is tight in all of the right places. I’m typically XL/XXL and got an XL, true to size! The only thing I would suggest is to size down if you’re short. I’m 5’6 and the length was maybe 1/2” too long but overall great. Best compared to many other “skims” dress dupes. (I do have shape-wear underneath)

Loving this dress so much!! Guys! I don’t really write reviews but wanted to make sure I took time out to write one for this dress. I was skeptical but it had SO many positive reviews that I finally pulled the trigger. When I pulled it out of the box it initially looked thin and not stretchy so I immediately was disheartened and assumed it wouldn’t fit. Then, like Cinderella’s shoe, it went right on! Perfect length too for this 5’3” person lol Could have worn without heels. I would say true to size, with me in a Large. SO comfy, quality structure, beautiful pattern, the style was on point, a little on the thin side on the white areas so nude under items required but honestly, such an amazing deal on a much more expensive looking dress! I will definitely look at purchasing another in a different color/pattern, should I need one. Thank you!! Very happy customer!

My first time buying A dress from Amazon Had a event to go to and nothing to wear that was spring like. Jumped on amazon and came across this absolutely beautiful 👗 which I thought was going to be to little. I'm 5'10 230 and I ordered an 2xl. I did see after ordering I should had went up an size. Y'all the dress fitted me good not tight it actually showed off my curves. I will most definitely buy another one. The color was exactly like the photo. I sprayed some wrinkle free and place it in the dryer to remove the wrinkles. There was no shrinkage it still fitted me like a glove. I advised to order up an size if you care to or take the chance like I did and just roll with it.

Love love love! Had a formal for a club that I’m in at my college and got this dress! I’m usually hesitant when it comes to buying dresses online in my size. I’m 5’5 and 180 lbs, I got the XL. Fit perfectly! Couldn’t be happier!

Good suit for interview Had an in person interview for the first time in 9 years and needed a suit! This was a comfortable and good fit. I am 5’9” and 190 lbs, I bought the XL because Amazon recommended it even though I usually wear a size 14 so that would have been the L. Glad I did because it fit well- not perfect, pants were slightly tight fitting even with the elastic. There is no lining in the pants or jacket so not great for a cold climate and I can definitely understand how some of the colors would be see-through without lining. The black was just fine. Pant length could be slightly longer for my height and heels but still worked ok. Small shoulder pads annoyed me. They are unnecessary. Would recommend as long as you know what you’re getting.

Looks like a robe Had high hopes for this dress but was disappointed in how it fit me. I am 5’7” and about 165. Also, the snap to close the chest was not in the appropriate spot for me as seen in the photos. I found a much more flattering dress for the wedding I will be attending.

Great Choice! Had my daughters jr prom to attend. Did not want to spend too much on myself, needed something that would still look nice. I was really happy with this dress. Got here quickly, fit perfect. I’m 5’1 and wore the dress with heals, as well as flats. Did not have any issues tripping at all. Tons of compliments too. I will be purchasing is more colors!
Super cute dress! Had to get it hemmed and altered in the boob area. Bra cup size 38DD and it just needed to be brought it a tad bit. Super flowy- has pockets. Ordered color sky blue size 14!

So impressed! Had to give a review on this gorgeous little dress! It came well packaged with no wrinkles, fit like a glove, is so comfortable/well made and looks exactly as described! Bought it last minute and it was perfect. Had to pick up a dress for a bridal shower and it came in within 2 days. The dress is double lined and it was way better quality than expected! This dress is incredible!!! Hands down one of the best dresses I've ever owned!!! I have 2 young kids and unfortunately still have a mummy tummy. I also have bigger but untoned arms. The cut of this dress and the perfectly placed seams make it so flattering despite being form fitting and with my tummy. It almost sucks your tummy in, but in a comfortable way. The inner layer is a stretchy material so even getting in and out of the car I didn't have to pull the dress up. I tried on countless dresses in many stores but came up empty handed. I'm so glad I turned to Amazon just a 5 days before the wedding I was attending. After reading all the awesome reviews I decided to give it a try and I couldn't have been happier! It was so comfortable all night long and the best part was that I felt confident in it, which I rarely do. If you're on the fence about this dress, don't be, just buy it, you won't regret it!!! For reference I'm 5'4 and weigh 140lbs and the medium fit perfectly!

Very Happy! Happy customer here!! I loved this dress when I saw it and after reading all the reviews I felt it was best to go up a size, everyone was saying it fit snug through the bust. I’m glad I did!!! I’m only 5’1 so I did have to have a couple of inches cut and hemmed, but other than that by going up a size everything fit nice and was comfortable. I received tons of compliments and especially for the price, I was extremely happy with this purchase.
Happy camper Happy with my purchase. I weigh 230 so ordered a XXL and fit good. Only complaint was that it’s hard to get it on since the under shape wear is attached to dress.

Stunning color and nice style! Hard to capture the color of this dress but it is a beautiful Kelly Green. I purchased this dress to wear to a weekend service and received several compliments. I had a woman approach me that I had never seen before and she told me my dress was stunning. I have never had that many people compliment my outfit in one day. It is a fun style that could even be worn to a wedding or other type event. I ordered a medium. I am curvy, 134lbs, 32DDD, long waisted and wear a 27 in jeans. I found the top to be a little big under the arm pit put not noticeable when my arms are down. The waist and hips fit perfectly. The only con to the dress is the elastic waist cheapens the look of the dress. I added a fun belt to cover it and it worked perfectly. Overall, I love this dress and think it is a great piece for the price. I would highly recommend, especially the Kelly green color.

Great fit but need better quality control. Make sure returns are free Having trouble posting separate reviews for each dress - Amazon technical glitch. So Im going to have to downgrade my original review. for starters my measurements are 35" (34C) - 28 -37.5" and Im 5'2" Color: Icy Blue size: Small stars: 5***** Great stretch thick fabric was snug but really defined my figure. The dress did have some shiny ironing marks that I was afraid wouldn't come out but I spray and steamed the area and they came out. Color: Wine size: Small stars: 3*** Great stretch and thick fabric but it had a white band that looked terrible and tacky against the wine color (picture 3). This dress was a bit smaller than the blue so I ordered the medium Color: Wine size: Medium stars: 5***** same great quality fabric loose fitting so I sprayed lightly and placed in dryer on Low for 10-15 min. The fit is much better now and got rid of some the marks. All dresses fit just below the knees but are still easy to walk in. Seller is non-responsive about questions I had before buying. I would recommend only purchasing through amazon prime because of Amazon's guarantee on free shipping and returns - if you run into problems with seller.

Fits like a very sparkly glove Heed the size chart, friends, it is COMPLETELY accurate. If you find yourself between sizes, you should probably size up rather than down because this does have a bit of stretch, but not an "I'll be okay sizing down" level of stretch, just enough to make it comfortable. I measure 37-29-40 and got the Medium, and it is perfect but with very little room to spare. Also I'm 5' 3" and the center of the skirt was pushing the "skirt length I'm comfortable wearing in public" limit, hitting right at mid-thigh, so be aware of that as well. For the price tho?! This is a great dress to have in your "last minute invitation wardrobe" arsenal, and the style is classic enough you'll be able to wear it for pretty much ever.

Runs a little big, but GREAT dress! Heeeey. Ok, this dress is SO pretty for the price! Wow! It does run a little big, but I’m not super comfortable in tight clothes so it was perfect. I’m normally a large, anywhere from 10/12 in clothes. I bought the large, but I bet I could have fit in a medium because it does not cling to me at ALL. However, I have a big butt so I didn’t want to risk the underlining part to be crazy tight around my butt. It’s not at ALL. This dress is actually slimming (I look skinnier!) and it’s comfy! The underslip hits mid thigh but when I bend over to touch my toes it still doesn’t come up to show my butt- it almost does, but that’s literally when I touch my toes! I need this for a rehearsal dinner and it is perfect. I’m 5’8” and 170 lbs and a C cup. Hope this helps!

An Afforfdable, Flattering Dress Height: 5 ft 4.5 in Weight: 165 lbs Size Ordered: 14 Compared to what the bridesmaids and mother-of-the-bride paid for their dresses, my mother-of-the-groom dress was a steal. I received so many compliments on it! The navy was a true navy that matched the wedding party perfectly. I did wear a light body shaper under it to hold in my tummy. My shoes were rhinestone platform sandals that made me about 3 1/2 inches taller and the dress was still a tiny bit long, so either prepare to wear very high heels or have the dress altered. Just FYI, I was sent the completely wrong dress the first time, so order early in case you need to do a return. The return was easy and Amazon got the correct dress to me just a couple of days later!

LOVE- measurements included in review for help height: 5’2 weight: 143# , athletic build waist: 27.5in hips: 39.5in (i don’t have “curvy” hips, i have hip dips, so mainly a bum measurement if that helps) bust: um, i LEGIT only wear sports bras-size medium, however, i do have a broad back this dress is BEAUTIFUL, true to size, only serious downfall (reason for the 4 stars) is that there is no hook in the back of the dress- it’s legit only a zipper, but i still don’t feel like that’s a good enough reason to not buy the dress because my zipper didn’t move/slide down at all.🤷🏽‍♀️ PLEASE get your size- it’s a bandage dress, so it stretches and hugs where it needs to, but not enough to go a whole size down for (i originally ordered a small because i usually have to due to having a smaller waist but it squeezed/flattened the heck out of my butt lol- medium fit perfect). if you have a larger chest, not sure how the “no support” will do for you.. it’s snug in the chest, but i would still have to pull my dress periodically throughout the day (however, i am more modest and feel like some things should be “left to the imagination” but yea)

The ruching accentuates curves & hides belly. It can be worn off the shoulders or on the shoulders. It's a midi so it hits right below the knees. The sleeves can be worn down or half up.

Love this dress! Height: 5’5” Weight: 240 B/W/H: 50in / 38in / 54in TL;DR: Highly recommend! Size down for a tighter fit as this is very stretchy or order your regular size for a less fitted dress. I ordered a XXL in the green color. This dress is super comfortable and way stretchier than I expected. In the picture, I clipped it in the back at the waist to make it a bit tighter, and I will take the dress in a couple inches at the waist. The straps are adjustable, but they do sit a bit wider than I’d like on my shoulders (almost slipping off). I’m not wearing anything under so this is sans shape-wear or support. The lining under the mesh portion is soft and lines up perfectly with the mesh top layer.

Classy! Perfect Fit! Height: 5’9 Weight: 240 Ordered Size: 3X I absolutely love the style of this dress. The dress is not too tight or too loose. It’s hard to find a dress to fit my body without being too tight but this dress did the job.

And this winner is...? Height: 5" Weight: 170 lbs Age: 71 Size: XL Color: Emerald Green My daughter is getting married in October and I wanted a dress that wasn't too blingy because I want to wear my mother's necklace which ties in nicely with the theme of the wedding. In June, based on the reviews, I ordered this dress in a medium and a large. Both were too tight (note: Koh Koh dresses tend to be made for Amazons--i.e. very long in the waist and very long in general) I was intrigued by this dress however, but being 5," I wasn't sure if it looked like I was wearing the dress or if it was "wearing" me. I took a photo and sent both back. I must've ordered 5+ more Koh Koh dresses but none measured up. I was also looking for Peacock Green but had no luck finding anything that fit. I also ordered from online bridal vendors but they were just "too much dress" and too much bling. Finally, in August I ordered this dress again in the proper size. It's not perfect--the armpits are too tight and it's too long--but as I'll need it hemmed anyway additional alterations won't be a big deal. I have one more dress on order from a major department store that cost 4x as much. It will probably cost that much to alter it. It's a safe bet that I won't be returning this dress and may even order one in another color!

A Good Buy! Hello Everyone! I thought this dress fit very well, I have a 42 in bust, 37 in waist and a 45 in hip and a size XL was perfect. I highly recommend following the size guide! I did and it ended up working out. The elastic band was very strechy and I was even able to fit it over my hips, the waist measurement isn't as important as the bust and hips. I am 5'9~5'10 and the dress just came to the tops of my feet, if you're 5'11 or up unfortunately this dress is going to be too short. I wear 38DDD/40DD bra size and found the bust/top portion of the dress to fit well, while also not making my bust appear larger than it is. I think this dress is flattering for curvy ladies! While the dress is fairly opaque, if the dress is stretched out a bit you are able see through it, but it wouldn't be as apparent in darker colors. I would only find this to be an issue if your body is going to stretch out the dress significantly. On me however when the dress is on, it is completely opaque, but I think the 60$ you pay should warrent a lining. Overall I think this dress is a good buy for a brides maids dress or for a special occasion!

Apricot dress review Hey ladies! Over all ...satisfied! Will be wearing this to my bridal shower. Great shipping transit! I placed my order on a Tuesday and recieved on a Thursday. I'm short 5'1 about 140-150 lbs. I purschaded a medium (I have a booty with a smaller waist) the mid section does have a elastic so it's stretchy and very breathable! Could've easily purchased a small but stuck with a medium so I would have "comfort" and not feel like it was too snug. This dress was very wrinkled when I took it out the bag (I did end up fixing it though) but I looked up how to get wrinkles out of polyester!! Flipped my dress inside out, got the iron and went to town! (You have to set the iron to a decent temp and the trick is to tap it across the dress) did this a few times and now it's perfect! Get the dress! Very classy and elegant color. I hope this helped! 💕

High quality material! Cute in theory but poor execution for some body types. High quality material! Nice durable satin dress. When I held the dress in my hands, I was so excited. However, when I tried it on, i was disappointed. It took me forever to figure out how to put it on. There's a random strap in the back that doesn't really do anything. For those with larger breasts, this seems like a wardrobe malfunction waiting to happen. No support or security. For those with shorter torsos, this dress just doesn't sit right - the back strap is all the way up to my shoulder blades but falls closer to the waist on the model. I can't smooth out all the extra material which leaves loose space for my breasts to pop out. I wanted this dress to work but it is just not made for my body (5'0", 32DD).

I'm 5'7", and I often wear these pants with a pair of booties to get that shorter look that's "in" now. I wore these to several events and many of my lady friends asked where I got them, they ordered some and were happy as well :) 5 stars. Stop shopping around, buy these. Totally worth it.

It’s almost perfect, except… I *nearly* had no complaints about this dress… until I looked in the mirror. The twist front is just a tad too small for my chest, so it looks like there’s a hole in the dress. No matter how much I tried to adjust the fabric, I couldn’t get it to sit right. And I don’t think I’m THAT large-chested (I’m a 38D). So, that’s something to be aware of before you buy this dress. If you’re around my size or larger, you may end up dealing with the same problem. Everything else about this dress I love, though. The sizing is spot-on otherwise; I ordered a medium and it fit great! The fabric is very soft and thick without making me sweaty, so it’s awesome for cold weather. That goes for the length, too— I paired the dress with some boots, so my entire body was covered and warm. Also, the color is very vibrant! I received quite a few compliments when I wore it to work. I really wanted to give this dress 5 starts, but the twist front ruined that for me. I don’t think it’s not worth trying for yourself, but just be aware that you may experience the same issue I had. If that’s a dealbreaker for you, you may want to reconsider getting this one.

Fits weird in some spots I absolutely love the style of this dress. I will say there 0 stretch. Very deep neck line. Super short on the sides of the legs (made it look flattering to me). Now, I didn’t like how cheap the zipper is. Also, so Much extra material in the shoulders of the stress. And there is also extra material in the breast of the dress. And I’m a 36d. I ordered a medium and it fit well in most places beside underneath the breast line that I felt like was a little snug. Also zipping it up in the back that was where it was a little tighter getting it up. It had so much slack in the back after the breast line it almost look like the dress was too big for me on the top. I may order a large and see what the differences in fitting with the zipper if anything I may take it to a seamstress and have it taken in. That’s how much I like the dress.

Beautiful and classy I absolutely love the way this dress fits! I am 5'8", 130ish lbs, and this fit me perfectly. I ordered two dresses from two different brands and ordered one small and one medium. THE perfect work pant I absolutely LOVE these pants. I’m 5’4” and weigh 235 lbs. This pant is so flattering and comfortable. They are perfect for summer as they breathe well, but are not see through. LOVE this dress, but size chart is WAY off! I absolutely LOVE this dress - so pretty! I got it in eggplant for my daughter's wedding in October. The picture here made the dress look more like fuchsia, but it is a beautiful shade of eggplant/aubergine. Extremely flattering shape for my big belly and overall squishy body. Neckline is high enough to be modest without looking Victorian. It has a nice amount of stretch to it so that it doesn't feel tight or restrictive - even the sleeves are comfortable. It's several inches too long, but at 5' 3", I expect that. The biggest problem was the sizing! I went by the manufacturer's chart in the pictures, and I fell right between 18W and 20W. The advice I saw was to order down, so I got the 18W. It was enormous! I could pull several inches away from my waist. Just to be safe, I then ordered both the 16W and 14W. The 16W was still way too roomy. The 14W fits nicely - not tight at all, anywhere. It's got some breathing room, and eating room, too. I have not worn a 14 anything in decades - their sizing is weird.

Fantastic holiday/night out dress I absolutely love this dress! It fits like a glove, is so soft, and has stretch (but no pockets, sad face). The v neck can go as deep as you want it to; you can get it more modest, or prop it open all the way down. There is elastic at the wrist to create a balloon sleeve, which normally I hate because my arms are short and it always looks dumb, but I think this works. The dress comes to just above my knee, I’m 5 feet tall, so on a taller person it will definitely be shorter. The tie at the waist helps create definition, but the way this dress fits I don’t think you even need it. It’s perfect to wear out to dinner or a holiday party (or just because if that’s your jam!) paired with some patterned tights and booties, or just flats. I see so many possibilities with this dress. Solid buy. If you can see yourself in it, it’s worth every penny. For reference, I am 5 feet tall, 110-115 lbs, got a size small.

Best. Dress. Ever. I adore this dress & I'm considering buying it in another color for a different event. I am 5'7", 145 lbs, and a 34B. Everything I read in the reviews said I should get a Small or Medium, & the size chart had me right on the fence between XS and S - I'm glad I ignored the reviews and went with my gut, getting the Extra Small (2-4) because it fits PERFECTLY. If you aren't quite sure what size to get, go with the size you'd normally choose with a top that's a little flowy, which for me is an XS. It is incredibly comfortable, the length is much shorter than I anticipated after seeing reviews about hemming and it dragging on the floor - for me it hits right at the ankle. It's a beautiful mulberry color, and it's perfect for an early summer wedding!

Stunning Dress, Consider Sizing Down if Between Sizes I adore this dress! As someone who's 5'6" and 190 lbs, I initially ordered an XL based on the sizing chart. The dress is made of a stretchy spandex material, which resulted in a slightly looser fit than I expected. Due to recent weight loss, I found myself between sizes, and in hindsight, I wish I had sized down for a more form-fitting look. Pros: Beautiful design and color Comfortable, stretchy material Made me feel stunningly beautiful. Versatile off-shoulder style Cons: Sizing may run a bit large Fit Tip: Consider sizing down if you're between sizes or want to accentuate your curves. However, if you prefer a more relaxed fit or want to conceal certain areas, stick with your usual size or even size up. I did wear shapewear underneath to achieve a smoother silhouette, which I'd recommend for the best look. Despite the sizing issue, I felt gorgeous in this dress and received many compliments. Overall, this is a fantastic dress for formal occasions. Just be mindful of the sizing and your personal preferences when ordering. Remember to check the size chart and consider your body shape when deciding.

Pear shapes rejoice! I agree with others to focus on your waist measurement - these are true wide leg pants. They're extremely flattering and comfy - my waist is 30" and my hips are 42" but I opted for the L because I typically don't trust anything that says I can wear M bottoms. They're a smidge loose at the waist but the elastic keeps them in place and I like the extra room. They're a little longer than I would have liked - they hit the floor for me and I'm 5'6". Also, the material is polyester and it does show - if they were a cotton blend it would be 5 stars from me.

I still love the skirt, and hope to salvage it somehow. You need body-colored seamless underwear, the top could be supportive (I am 34DD, so it will have to stretch), but I did not get a chance to test it, I planned to use silicone pasties for the bra. What a fantastic fit I always wonder how stretchy the fabric is and sizing charts are always a bit tricky for a body type that can't fit the ranges perfectly. I decided on a small and was glad I did. My measurements are as follows (with a sports bra on) and this dress was perfect: Chest: 34 inches Waist: 28.25 inches (belly button level) Hips: 33.25 inches It has a bit of a stretch, a good long zipper, form fitting. A quick steam and I was ready to go. I love the neckline because it covers my chest and allows be to wear a variety of bras and it won't show. I love the fitted body and exposed arms. The color is a lovely rich burgundy and one of my favorite colors. I was in cold and hang dry and it dries pretty quickly. A quick steam after and it is ready to be worn.

So pleasant surprised! I am 5’1 about 115 lbs and ordered my normal size, XS. I fully expected this dress to be a flop and that I would end up returning but was shocked with how much I love it! Maybe the pattern obscures it on the one I got? Still worth it! Love!

Perfect! Couldn't be happier! I am 5'11", currently 182 lb, 15 weeks pregnant with #5, extremely bloated (yay, NY style pizza LOL), 36C/pear-shaped and COULDN'T BE HAPPIER WITH THIS DRESS! I ordered a size large (I typically wear a women's US10 pants and medium tops) and didn't even have to use the side zipper to get in it. It was heavier than I anticipated; however, that's a pro not a con. It's a sturdy/good quality material. It could get a little warm while worn in FL. The only thing that couldn't keep up with my height, is the sleeves. They are not long on me, they're 3/4 length. I'm perfectly fine with that. As you see, the dress is knee length, and is exactly what I hoped for. As many have already said, the straps inside the lace at the shoulders, is fantastic! I'd not be happy with it otherwise. I think I have average shoulders, so maybe narrow shoulders would need to size down. There is a small snag at the zipper, but it's nothing that can't be solved with a quick flame (to shrink and seal it).

Black short sleeve and long sleeve - overall good! I am 5’3”, 155 pounds, curvy, 32/34 DDD. Wearing a sports bra in the pictures, but there is enough room for a regular bra without gaping. As a side note, the pictures are with it not ironed/steamed. The pictures aren’t the most flattering but it helps when you’re deciding :) I got the short sleeve (pictured) and long sleeve in medium. The material is softer than a general dress shirt and not see through (could be worn without an undershirt). It is long enough to tuck in if you choose. I like that my chest/bust actually fits in it comfortably, which is hard to find for me. I like the black buttons and they are well placed in the chest area. For the short sleeve, I think the length of the sleeves is perfect. The only reason I gave it 4 instead of 5 stars is because the material doesn’t stretch at all. I have enough room to move around but for me specifically, have some restricted movement (like if you’re wearing it for a more active job). I think that would all depend how one’s body is or if that bothers you. For me personally, if my chest/bust was smaller then I don’t think it would be an issue at all. The only other thing I would prefer is more of a fitted waist.

Follow the actual measurements rather than the numerical sizes for accurate fit. I am 5'5, approx 145 lbs, and typically wear a medium or large depending on how clothing is made, but usually always in the 8/10 size range. With my measurements of a 38" chest and about a 32" waist, I decided to order the large despite it saying it was for US sizes 12-14, and it worked perfectly for me. I would say the Large fits more like an 8/10 and measurements in the listing are spot on. I didn't have high hopes for this dress, so I was pleasantly surprised. It is very comfortable and is like a thicker, soft style tshirt type of material. The material is stretchy, so if you order a size that is very fitting/too small, it will likely be unforgiving and require a smoothing undergarment to assist with lumps, bumps and overhang of skin that some of us develop after having babies and aging. This dress would work great for an event or night out. It is mature, elegant looking despite the comfort, and would be cute with flats or heels. Just make sure you measure yourself before ordering.

I wear a 16 - 18 most of the time, but with clothing such as this coat, the shoulders are ALWAYS too small! I can get a 18 on but unable to move my arms due to tightness. I ordered this coat in ***RED 2XL*** (Size 22) and it fits PERFECT! It is snug, but I am able to move freely! The red is a warm and BRIGHT Christmas festive! I get many compliments. "Machine Wash, Hand Wash Only" OPPS! Too late! I washed it in the washing machine, warm water and dried in dryer on low heat. Did not fade, did not shrink: I will not test this again, will take to cleaner. Material: It reads "wool" but not what tag says in coat - see photos. However, it feels like a thick felt, fairly soft and 100% acceptable to this very picky old woman. The lining is beautiful too. IMPORTANT: The sewing is done well! PRICE: Is it worth the price? With free shipping I supposed. Before all the inflation etc. this coat would cost about $50 As I am CHEAP yes I'm complaining a tad, but much too happy with the coat I will shut up about the price =)

Fits beautifully and classy I am 5’6 & 156 pounds. I have an apple figure over a pear figure. The quality of the material is decent and I felt attractive in the dress. The dress is classy, conservative, and does not show cleavage. I love the way the cascade of material starts on one side at the top of the dress and is down the other side of the body with the slit showing the leg. I did not have to alter the dress. It was a perfect length with medium heels. The material had give because it was a little stretchy and this made it fit in all the right places with my figure type. I purchased a black one and a rose colored pink one. The black was more flattering and hides the bodily imperfections more than the pink.The downfall was that I wore a bracelet with rhinestones and it kept getting caught in the material and snagged it a lot at my hip, and when I would lift my arm it would snag the dress material on one side of my chest. Therefore, do not wear rhinestone bracelets that will snag the dress. If you need a bracelet, wear one that is smooth or none!!

Beautiful - but scratchy sequins I am 5'6 and 165lbs with a 34DD bra. I wore this dress to a black tie wedding and got a ton of compliments! I cut the sheer sleeves off because I felt they looked a bit cheap for the dress. The dark green color was stunning! The dress is rather low cut I did feel a bit exposed. I have a DD chest and had to forgo a bra because the dress was snug in the bust. It worked out in the end and kept my babies up where they belong. This dress held snug where I needed it to and flared out at just the right spot to hide my belly area that I am not so comfortable with. My only issue with the dress was the sequins under my arms. They rubbed my arms raw... I had little cuts from dancing all night. Maybe if I had kept the sleeves on the dress this would not have been an issue. All and all I truly love this dress and do recommend it!

long split sleeve dress I am 5'7 1/2" ... usually wear a 0x/1x... 38DDD. This dress is quite lovely in person. I think it would be flattering on a wide range of sizes. I ordered the xxl. I like that the neckline is modest and the sleeve slits are nice to cover the wobbly upper arms of this grandma - and yet - stylish. The material is a poly/spandex blend... the tag says 95% poly and 5% spandex. The hem is nicely finished - I tried to show in a pic. The waist is a wide strip of elastic - quite comfortable and not tight at all. I don't wear heels any more, so I found the length perfect for me. Washing instructions say: "cool hand wash. cool iron on reverse side, do not wring or tumble dry. Do not dry clean. Lay flat to dry to keep shape." The only thing I could think that would make this dress perfect would be pockets!! (NO POCKETS in dress- making sure I don't confuse anyone...) I washed it on my machine hand wash cycle and laid it flat to dry. It doesn't wrinkle so it would be a great traveling dress. I am considering other colors or prints.

Sizing and quality control issues. I am 5’7”, 125 pounds and flat chested. I purchased a medium in the white shirt (in photos) last year. It was HUGE! I bought the blue in a small size this year as I love the style. I compared them side by side and the medium is 1.75 inches larger in the torso. The sleeves are a good 1” larger and the back length is 1/2” shorter. (?) note in first photo that one of the sleeves is longer than the other. The blue also has quality issues from a seamstress perspective. (Yes, I teach sewing classes) The left sleeve is 3/4” longer than the right and also the torso. The fabric is soft and washes well. It did not shrink. When cut on the grain (the blue shirt not the white), it looks nice on. I have ordered a second one in wine that I am waiting to be delivered in 3 days. I will add my review of all 3 when I receive it. Well, the wine shirt is incredible! It is my all time favorite and looks great with leggings. The sleeve length (although slightly 1/8” off) is easy to live with. I increased my rating to 4 stars and will be ordering this shirt in another color.

I bought the blue in a small size this year as I love the style. I compared them side by side and the medium is 1.75 inches larger in the torso. The sleeves are a good 1” larger and the back length is 1/2” shorter. (?) note in first photo that one of the sleeves is longer than the other. The blue also has quality issues from a seamstress perspective. (Yes, I teach sewing classes) The left sleeve is 3/4” longer than the right and also the torso. The fabric is soft and washes well. It did not shrink. When cut on the grain (the blue shirt not the white), it looks nice on. I have ordered a second one in wine that I am waiting to be delivered in 3 days. I will add my review of all 3 when I receive it. Well, the wine shirt is incredible! It is my all time favorite and looks great with leggings. The sleeve length (although slightly 1/8” off) is easy to live with. I increased my rating to 4 stars and will be ordering this shirt in another color.

I did have it hemmed a couple inches because I am tall enough that the length was awkward. I also lower the slits and inch each because it was for a wedding and they came up really high on my thigh. Love this dress, worth the cost of alterations for sure.

Review for Size 14 dress I am 5'7", 220lbs, 40DD chest with a post 2 c-section fupa (also lost weight super fast from 300+lbs in a year so my abdominal skin is loose). Basically, not a pretty abdominal area and it needs to be camouflaged. Hopefully some of you will be able to connect or associate your figures to mine and that this review helps. I purchased this dress with the hopes it would "slim" down my figure for upcoming Christmas photos. I am not disappointed at all. It definitely does what I was hoping for - but I expect any empire waist dress would do this. I do love that this dress ties in the back. So pretty! I was worried about how the chest would fit and the potential for showing cleavage. My chest does not fill out the top by any means. It's covered but if I "set" the top a certain way I could definitely see potential for cleavage. As I bought this for Christmas card photos, I am opting for the more conservative "setting" of the top of this dress to reduce cleavage. If you're looking to flaunt, I definitely think you'll be satisfied. The dress hides all insecurities and highlights the best assets. I love the material of the dress! Soft and flowy. Very comfortable. (Black heels are from Walmart. $10. Most comfortable heels EVER! They come with padding in them. You won't be disappointed).

Not great for large arms I am 5'8 and weight 256. I am pear shaped, carrying most of my weight in my hips, thighs, and arms. Size XL: I really loved the way this fit me except the arms look TERRIBLE. If I had thinner arms I would be sold but it just made my arms look larger. Because my back side is larger, it did come up more at the bottom in the back, but with heels that wouldn't be a problem. Size XXL: I was hoping with a size up the extra material at my arms would look more flowing but it looked worse. The extra material everywhere just made me look bigger all over. If you have a build like me, I would say stay away from this dress unless you want to tailor it. The material is a little thick so if you add shapewear you might get hot (and it also clung to my bra so it might do the same to that as well). It is overall a very nice dress for the price. The material does not look cheap and has a classy look. It is just not flattering for my body type.

Flattering! I am 5'8, 225 pounds, and 40DD and this fit snug wearing the 2XL. The material is thick and covers you. The V neck part is good where it gives a tiny bit of cleavage without the girls all hanging out. The only thing was the ruffly sleeves- there was all this extra ruffle under the armpit that you don't need, it will only make you look wider. I cut and pinned it back and trimmed off and pinned some of this ruffle sleeve under the armpit to make that part smaller. I tried on the navy, black, dark green, and burgundy. The dark green looked like 'sea creature' on me, the burgundy was too 'Christmas party at the office', and the navy and black were the winner that you just can't go wrong with. I didn't dare try the lilac or light pink because at my size, it would just make me look more gigantic than I already am! (let's be honest here!) The ruffled down the stomach covers most of the tummy so you won't be too self conscious about your mid section. I usually don't like a high-lo dress where it is higher in the front and lower in the back because they can look cheap, but this doesn't at all. I will get a lot of wear out of the dress. Def a good buy at a good price.

Great dress I am 5'8" and 155 lbs. I wore this dress to a wedding (with the belt and an up-do hair style) and to a Quinceanera (without the belt and hair down). I ordered 3 total dresses. Two large dresses, one in this print and one in solid pink. And then I ordered one dress in this print but in medium. The dress in this picture is medium and overall fit me the best. The patterned dress in size large was a little baggy in the top but the solid pink in large fit very well also. So I could have gone with either size medium or large as both fit very well. My measurements would suggest that I would need a large in this dress but medium fit me very well. I love this dress and felt great wearing it at both events. The material is nice. There were some wrinkles when the dress arrived but I had it dry cleaned and they came out no problem. In addition, the events were 2 days apart and I did not have time to get it cleaned in between. Even after wearing it to both events it did not get wrinkled. I am very happy with this dress and I feel like the only thing that would have made it better is if it had pockets.

Good fit and nice looking I am 5'9 and 160 lbs 39-34-41 and I ordered a size 12. I could probably have gone a size smaller since I will not be wearing a bra underneath it. It fit well and has an elegant look to it but upon closer inspection you can tell it is not high quality. For example, while the chiffon on the outside looks nice, the liner is made out of costume looking satin which is fine enough since it is not visible. The lace looks nice but upon close inspection you can see that it wasn't finished very well. The lace is stitched to a fine mesh area but the area has no give and so raising your arms can be a bit clumsy and awkward looking. It definitely looks nice and not as cheap looking as I expected but you get what you pay for.

True to size - Plenty long - Amazing Quality - Super Flattering I am 5’9, 140 lbs, 34B chest (ordered a size medium). I typically can never find a maxi style dress that is long enough and normally I order a larger size hoping the length is longer. But when I do that I can never fill out the chest as mine is small. I read through tons of reviews and everyone said this dress is great quality (semi thick spandex material - but not tight), plenty long (I can even wear heels with it) and true to size (couldn’t be more spot on)! This is exactly what I was looking for as I have an outdoor wedding in MN (45 degrees) but wanted something that would look nice under a coat (be semi warm - yet look cute) and still be cool enough once the reception started indoors and drinks start flowing! The pictures I have posted show the slit which stops about 3 inches above my knee. The detail of the twist and how low the kneck line comes. Lastly, I am showing the length of the dress barefoot and with a 3 inch heel! Again, I’m am 5’9 and this length couldn’t be more perfect! For those of you who worry about the belly area, the twist stops about 2 inches above my bellybutton disguising all flaws - take it from someone who never wears tight fitting clothes! HIGHLY RECOMMEND!

Beautiful color, style, and fit. Does bleed color on first 2 washes at least. I am 5'9" and about 155 lbs. I ordered a Large. The dress length was good. I loved the length of the wrap portion. The color was exactly what I had hoped for. Sorry for not having pictures of just the dress! I didn't even think of it. I used my gopi scarf to accent the dress for my ceremony. The material was not what I expected for some reason (I could have read but didn't lol!) but it was okay. However, it did bleed red the 2 times I have washed it so far, dying some white clothes. The dress came with a separate piece I think for wearing underneath as a sort of bra, but I couldn't really find a wrap that looked good with it. Overall I was super happy with this, and would consider purchasing more in the future in different colors if I can figure out how to wrap in different styles :)

Decent dress for shorter person I am 5ft 4in, 245 lbs and a 40DDD. I purchased this dress for a wedding I am attending. The dress was the perfect length for me. It just barely touched the ground with no shoes on. I purchased the dark emerald green color. The color was as expected compared to the images online. The dress is comfortable, not an itchy material. The material is slightly stretchy and is not see through. The arms were a little snug, but since the material is stretchy it was fine. The dress zips up in the back. I think the dress is a good value for the money, but if you are my height and weigh more it may be a little snug for you, but that's what Free amazon returns are for :) it's a nice dress and worth a try.

Perfect Buy: Happy 😊 customer I am 5ft 7" and 246lbs. I bought 2XL for myself and small for my daughter. Both dresses fit almost perfectly 👌 😍 They were loose under the arms. So, I stitched them 2 inches on each side just under the arms. Never needed to adjust the body of the dress. The fabric is thick yet breathable and mild on the skin. It stretched nicely and the quality of the product is great for the cost. It's the exact colour as advertised. Shipping was on time as promised. I wore a 3" stilettos and my dress was still flowing. This was for a family cruise dinner. I bought another design and it never needed any adjustment. It fitted perfectly. It's a win!! Ps. Purple is my favourite colour 💜 keep your camera's 📸 flash on for a purple 💜 image😉
